Quality gates to satisfy visually:
- 必须能看出这是连续 deck 的一页。
- 必须包含标题、核心结论/说明、结构化内容区。
- 不要编造公司名、真实客户案例、市场规模、年份、benchmark 或未给定数字。
- single coherent slide, not a collage of unrelated panels
- use the full 16:9 canvas with balanced density; avoid large accidental empty regions
- presentation polish should be comparable to a manually designed high-impact academic overview slide
- contains enough readable explanatory text to be useful as a PPT slide: title, takeaway, section labels, and concise body copy
- must not look like a layout-only wireframe or unlabeled component scaffold
- clear focal hierarchy with generous margins and no overcrowding
- high contrast between foreground and background
- no overlapping text or visual elements
- no cropped important content near slide edges
- no unreadable microtext, mojibake, pseudo-letters, or random captions
- data-like visuals must be source-grounded or deliberately abstract
- when verified metrics are unavailable, use unlabeled abstract mini-charts or schematic indicators rather than fake numbers
- professional typography and spacing suitable for a 16:9 presentation

Visual richness guidance:
- do not reduce the slide to five plain cards; add source-safe visual substance inside and around the pipeline
- synthetic thumbnails are allowed when they are clearly generic: microscopy-like panels, figure crops, mask overlays, charts, asset swatches, vector nodes, and editable-canvas previews
- unlabeled charts may show abstract trends, bars, or scatter patterns for visual metaphor only; do not add axis labels, numeric values, legends with unsupported method names, or performance claims
- avoid domain-specific imagery such as biomedical cells, molecules, organs, maps, hardware, company products, or clinical scenes unless provided by the source context
- for generic AI/pipeline topics, use neutral paper-figure thumbnails, document crops, layout grids, chart placeholders, mask overlays, UI-free vector diagrams, and editable-canvas previews
- show process transformation visually: raw figure -> detected text/regions -> separated assets -> native shapes -> editable slide output
- use varied panel scale, subtle shadows, thin rules, and accent color blocks to create depth and a finished editorial look
- include enough small visual detail to feel premium, while keeping semantic modules cleanly separable for DrawAI
- if a subtitle is useful, derive it only from the primary request and avoid unsupported claims

Composition guidance:
- 这是一组模板图库横向测试，每张图都必须是完整 PPT 页面，不是海报或纯插画。
- 同一模板的 4 页需要有明显连续 deck 一致性：标题系统、色彩、模块风格、图标/线条语言一致。
- 只根据本页 page_brief 改变页面类型；不要改变总主题。
- 文字应跟随用户输入语言和 visible_text_blocks，不要生成随机英文栏目或伪文字。
- compose like a finished slide, not a sparse wireframe or UI mockup
- use a rich overview structure when appropriate: title plus subtitle, left input bookend, central pipeline, right output bookend, and compact bottom overview band
- for academic or technical topics, prefer a left-to-right pipeline, method/results overview, or evidence hierarchy
- use abstract, source-safe visual evidence when exact datasets are unavailable: synthetic figure thumbnails, module cards, flow arrows, masks, crop examples, schematic charts without numeric labels
- maintain Swiss/editorial discipline: aligned columns, consistent spacing, restrained color accents, and clear typographic scale
- keep every visible label purposeful; do not add decorative pseudo-text to fill space
- make the result feel publication/presentation ready at first glance while preserving factual restraint

DrawAI post-processing constraints:
- 文本区域保持高对比，方便 OCR 识别。
- 模块边界清晰，方便 SAM/DrawAI 后续可编辑重建。
- 避免将语义文字压在复杂纹理、强噪声或低对比渐变上。
- use crisp object boundaries and clean layer separation where possible
- keep text regions high contrast and OCR-friendly if text appears
- avoid textured noise directly behind text or chart labels
- avoid excessive glow, blur, transparency, and low-contrast gradients over semantic content
- prefer simple geometric regions for tables, charts, cards, arrows, and panels
- leave enough spacing for DrawAI to segment text, icons, charts, and decorative assets

Variant instruction:
Create the strongest single version; do not make a collage or compare alternatives inside the image.

Negative constraints:
none

Final response contract: reply only {"generated": true}.

images.revised_prompt:
Create a single high-quality 16:9 PPT slide bitmap, 2048x1152 PNG, opaque background. Theme: Chinese technical documentation deck, Developer Docs visual system, page 4/4 of a continuous deck titled about “AI Agent 工作流如何接入企业文档体系”. Use a polished documentation-grade technical slide style: light docs base, crisp white panels, thin blue/green accent rules, monospace-style small tags only where readable, clean Chinese sans typography, structured architecture clarity, no logos, no company names.

Slide title text, large and exact Chinese: “治理与上线闭环”. Subtitle/takeaway below title, readable: “上线后要持续监控来源可信、权限越界、风险回答和失败样例。” Include a small page marker “04 / 04” in the top right, consistent with a developer documentation deck.

Main composition: a premium governance closed-loop diagram, not a sparse wireframe. Use a central circular/hexagonal closed-loop workflow with six clearly separated modules connected by arrows, each with a simple line icon and concise body copy. Required module labels, exact Chinese and readable: “来源可信”, “权限控制”, “风险拦截”, “效果评估”, “灰度上线”, “反馈复盘”.

Suggested module copy, all in Chinese, concise and OCR-friendly:
- 来源可信: “标记文档来源、版本与更新状态”
- 权限控制: “按角色与场景收敛可访问范围”
- 风险拦截: “对越权、敏感与不确定回答先拦截”
- 效果评估: “跟踪命中、复核与失败样例”
- 灰度上线: “从小范围试运行到逐步放量”
- 反馈复盘: “把人工反馈回流到知识治理与编排”

Add a left-side compact “上线门禁” control matrix panel with rows labeled: “文档接入”, “知识治理”, “权限边界”, “检索增强”, “工作流编排”, “持续评估”. Use check marks or status dots, no unsupported metrics. Add a small note at bottom of this panel: “门禁项来自文档接入 Agent 的关键环节”.

Add a right-side compact “测试指标看板” panel using only the supplied synthetic metrics. Render four small horizontal progress bars with exact labels and values:
“文档覆盖率 72%”, “检索命中率 81%”, “人工复核通过率 88%”, “高风险回答拦截率 96%”. Add a tiny but readable footnote: “数值为测试样例数据，不代表真实业务结果。” Do not add any other numbers.

Bottom band: one clear conclusion callout with blue/green accent: “闭环原则：先控权限与来源，再观测风险与效果，最后通过灰度和复盘持续迭代。” Keep it source-grounded and generic.

Visual details: full canvas usage with generous margins, aligned grid, crisp separable cards and arrows for downstream segmentation, high contrast text on simple light backgrounds. Add subtle code-adjacent motifs such as tiny generic tags like “policy”, “review”, “monitor” only if readable and secondary; do not include fake API endpoints, random code, pseudo-writing, citations, dates, benchmarks, logos, or named entities. Avoid complex textures behind text, avoid overlap, no cropped content. The slide should look like a finished premium PPT explanation page for enterprise management, knowledge management, AI product and technical teams, with Chinese dominant throughout.

Topic / page: 第 1/4 页，接入总览。Title: “AI Agent 工作流如何接入企业文档体系”. Takeaway sentence: “不是把文档丢给模型，而是把知识源、权限、检索和评估接成可控闭环。” Audience: 企业管理层、知识管理团队、AI 产品与技术团队.

Use the “economist_data_story” visual system as a broad editorial data-story reference only: light editorial paper-like base, restrained beige tint, red/blue/teal chart accents, chart-first structure, concise Chinese annotations, compact authoritative typography. Do not reproduce any protected publication layout, logo, masthead, or trademarked marks.

Layout: finished PPT explanation page, not a wireframe. Strong first-glance hierarchy. Top-left editorial title block with a small page marker “01 / 接入总览” and the full Chinese title. Under it, the takeaway sentence in a clean emphasized band or rule. Main visual center must dominate: a large annotated left-to-right pipeline / schematic chart showing enterprise documents becoming controlled Agent workflow.

Central pipeline modules, all clearly labeled in Chinese and visually separable for downstream segmentation:
1. “文档接入” on the left: generic document-source stack, file sheets, wiki/page icons, folder blocks. Add small concise notes: “多源文档汇入”, “解析与切分”.
2. “知识治理”: index/grid layer with taxonomy nodes and quality check marks. Notes: “结构化元数据”, “版本与质量规则”.
3. “权限边界”: gate/shield boundary across the pipeline, distinct red accent. Notes: “按角色过滤”, “敏感内容隔离”.
4. “Agent 编排”: workflow nodes with tool-call-like circles and route lines, no product UI or company names. Notes: “检索增强”, “任务步骤编排”.
5. “持续评估”: loop arrow returning from the right back to governance, with review/check dashboard motif. Notes: “人工复核”, “风险拦截与改进”.

Make the high-level structure explicit: from “文档源” to “知识索引” to “Agent 工作流” to “治理闭环”. Use these as secondary labels across the top of the main chart or along the flow. Add a visible feedback loop arrow from 持续评估 back to 知识治理 / 权限边界.

Include a compact bottom evidence/metrics strip using ONLY these supplied synthetic test metrics, clearly noting they are sample data: 文档覆盖率 72%, 检索命中率 81%, 人工复核通过率 88%, 高风险回答拦截率 96%. Render as four small editorial stat blocks or small bars, with a small note: “注：数值为测试样例数据，不代表真实业务结果。” Do not add any other numbers, dates, company names, citations, benchmarks, rankings, market sizes, or customer cases.

Body copy must be concise and source-grounded. Include a small “核心逻辑” callout with 3 bullets derived only from supplied content:
- “先治理知识源，再开放给 Agent 调用”
- “权限、检索与编排共同决定回答边界”
- “评估结果回流，形成持续改进闭环”

Visual polish: full canvas, balanced density, generous margins, high contrast. Use clean geometric regions, thin rules, subtle shadows, crisp object boundaries, clear module separation. Avoid large empty areas, overcrowding, overlapping text, cropped content, unreadable microtext, pseudo-writing, random English headings, fake UI, logos, maps, domain-specific imagery, or unsupported chart axes. Charts without supplied data should be abstract and unlabeled. Chinese remains dominant; English only in “AI Agent” where used. Make the slide feel like page 1 of a coherent 4-page deck with consistent editorial palette and typography.

- clear focal hierarchy with generous margins and no overcrowding
- high contrast between foreground and background
- no overlapping text or visual elements
- no cropped important content near slide edges
- no unreadable microtext, mojibake, pseudo-letters, or random captions
- data-like visuals must be source-grounded or deliberately abstract
- when verified metrics are unavailable, use unlabeled abstract mini-charts or schematic indicators rather than fake numbers
- professional typography and spacing suitable for a 16:9 presentation

Visual richness guidance:
- do not reduce the slide to five plain cards; add source-safe visual substance inside and around the pipeline
- synthetic thumbnails are allowed when they are clearly generic: microscopy-like panels, figure crops, mask overlays, charts, asset swatches, vector nodes, and editable-canvas previews
- unlabeled charts may show abstract trends, bars, or scatter patterns for visual metaphor only; do not add axis labels, numeric values, legends with unsupported method names, or performance claims
- avoid domain-specific imagery such as biomedical cells, molecules, organs, maps, hardware, company products, or clinical scenes unless provided by the source context
- for generic AI/pipeline topics, use neutral paper-figure thumbnails, document crops, layout grids, chart placeholders, mask overlays, UI-free vector diagrams, and editable-canvas previews
- show process transformation visually: raw figure -> detected text/regions -> separated assets -> native shapes -> editable slide output
- use varied panel scale, subtle shadows, thin rules, and accent color blocks to create depth and a finished editorial look
- include enough small visual detail to feel premium, while keeping semantic modules cleanly separable for DrawAI
- if a subtitle is useful, derive it only from the primary request and avoid unsupported claims

Composition guidance:
- 这是一组模板图库横向测试，每张图都必须是完整 PPT 页面，不是海报或纯插画。
- 同一模板的 4 页需要有明显连续 deck 一致性：标题系统、色彩、模块风格、图标/线条语言一致。
- 只根据本页 page_brief 改变页面类型；不要改变总主题。
- 文字应跟随用户输入语言和 visible_text_blocks，不要生成随机英文栏目或伪文字。
- compose like a finished slide, not a sparse wireframe or UI mockup
- use a rich overview structure when appropriate: title plus subtitle, left input bookend, central pipeline, right output bookend, and compact bottom overview band
- for academic or technical topics, prefer a left-to-right pipeline, method/results overview, or evidence hierarchy
- use abstract, source-safe visual evidence when exact datasets are unavailable: synthetic figure thumbnails, module cards, flow arrows, masks, crop examples, schematic charts without numeric labels
- maintain Swiss/editorial discipline: aligned columns, consistent spacing, restrained color accents, and clear typographic scale
- keep every visible label purposeful; do not add decorative pseudo-text to fill space
- make the result feel publication/presentation ready at first glance while preserving factual restraint

DrawAI post-processing constraints:
- 文本区域保持高对比，方便 OCR 识别。
- 模块边界清晰，方便 SAM/DrawAI 后续可编辑重建。
- 避免将语义文字压在复杂纹理、强噪声或低对比渐变上。
- use crisp object boundaries and clean layer separation where possible
- keep text regions high contrast and OCR-friendly if text appears
- avoid textured noise directly behind text or chart labels
- avoid excessive glow, blur, transparency, and low-contrast gradients over semantic content
- prefer simple geometric regions for tables, charts, cards, arrows, and panels
- leave enough spacing for DrawAI to segment text, icons, charts, and decorative assets

Variant instruction:
Create the strongest single version; do not make a collage or compare alternatives inside the image.

Negative constraints:
none

Create a central left-to-right process pipeline as the dominant visual, like an annotated chart/process diagram. Include six clearly separated modules with required labels: “采集”, “清洗分块”, “元数据标注”, “向量索引”, “权限绑定”, “质量检查”. Each module should have a compact icon/abstract visual and 1 short Chinese explanatory line derived only from the prompt:

- 权限绑定：把知识单元绑定访问边界

Add a compact bottom band with four source-grounded synthetic test metric tiles using only these numbers and labels: “文档覆盖率 72%”, “检索命中率 81%”, “人工复核通过率 88%”, “高风险回答拦截率 96%”. Make charts/data-like visuals source-safe: use the supplied four percentages only in bottom metric tiles; any other tiny mini-charts in module icons must be abstract and unlabeled. Use high contrast dark text on light panels, accent red for risk/check highlights, blue/teal for indexing and flow, beige only as subtle paper tint. Thin rules, small callout annotations, subtle shadows, crisp object boundaries, clear segmentation-friendly panels. Avoid pseudo-writing and random English headings. Chinese must dominate. No overlapping text, no cropped edges, no tiny unreadable text, no decorative noise behind text. Must look like a coherent page in a 4-slide deck, with small page marker “02 / 04” in the upper right or footer.

- 不要编造公司名、真实客户案例、市场规模、年份、benchmark 或未给定数字。
- single coherent slide, not a collage of unrelated panels
- use the full 16:9 canvas with balanced density; avoid large accidental empty regions

- no overlapping text or visual elements

- data-like visuals must be source-grounded or deliberately abstract
- when verified metrics are unavailable, use unlabeled abstract mini-charts or schematic indicators rather than fake numbers

Visual richness guidance:
- do not reduce the slide to five plain cards; add source-safe visual substance inside and around the pipeline
- synthetic thumbnails are allowed when they are clearly generic: microscopy-like panels, figure crops, mask overlays, charts, asset swatches, vector nodes, and editable-canvas previews
- unlabeled charts may show abstract trends, bars, or scatter patterns for visual metaphor only; do not add axis labels, numeric values, legends with unsupported method names, or performance claims
- avoid domain-specific imagery such as biomedical cells, molecules, organs, maps, hardware, company products, or clinical scenes unless provided by the source context
- for generic AI/pipeline topics, use neutral paper-figure thumbnails, document crops, layout grids, chart placeholders, mask overlays, UI-free vector diagrams, and editable-canvas previews
- show process transformation visually: raw figure -> detected text/regions -> separated assets -> native shapes -> editable slide output
- use varied panel scale, subtle shadows, thin rules, and accent color blocks to create depth and a finished editorial look
- include enough small visual detail to feel premium, while keeping semantic modules cleanly separable for DrawAI
- if a subtitle is useful, derive it only from the primary request and avoid unsupported claims

Composition guidance:
- 这是一组模板图库横向测试，每张图都必须是完整 PPT 页面，不是海报或纯插画。
- 同一模板的 4 页需要有明显连续 deck 一致性：标题系统、色彩、模块风格、图标/线条语言一致。
- 只根据本页 page_brief 改变页面类型；不要改变总主题。
- 文字应跟随用户输入语言和 visible_text_blocks，不要生成随机英文栏目或伪文字。
- compose like a finished slide, not a sparse wireframe or UI mockup
- use a rich overview structure when appropriate: title plus subtitle, left input bookend, central pipeline, right output bookend, and compact bottom overview band
- for academic or technical topics, prefer a left-to-right pipeline, method/results overview, or evidence hierarchy
- use abstract, source-safe visual evidence when exact datasets are unavailable: synthetic figure thumbnails, module cards, flow arrows, masks, crop examples, schematic charts without numeric labels
- maintain Swiss/editorial discipline: aligned columns, consistent spacing, restrained color accents, and clear typographic scale
- keep every visible label purposeful; do not add decorative pseudo-text to fill space
- make the result feel publication/presentation ready at first glance while preserving factual restraint

DrawAI post-processing constraints:
- 文本区域保持高对比，方便 OCR 识别。
- 模块边界清晰，方便 SAM/DrawAI 后续可编辑重建。
- 避免将语义文字压在复杂纹理、强噪声或低对比渐变上。
- use crisp object boundaries and clean layer separation where possible
- keep text regions high contrast and OCR-friendly if text appears
- avoid textured noise directly behind text or chart labels
- avoid excessive glow, blur, transparency, and low-contrast gradients over semantic content
- prefer simple geometric regions for tables, charts, cards, arrows, and panels
- leave enough spacing for DrawAI to segment text, icons, charts, and decorative assets

Variant instruction:
Create the strongest single version; do not make a collage or compare alternatives inside the image.

Negative constraints:
none

images.revised_prompt:
Create one 2048x1152 opaque PNG, a premium finished 16:9 PPT slide bitmap in an Economist Data Story inspired editorial system, without reproducing any protected publication logo or exact layout. Chinese-first slide. Topic: 《AI Agent 工作流如何接入企业文档体系》 page 4/4, governance and launch closed loop.

Render all text directly in the image, crisp and OCR-readable. Use a light editorial paper background, black/dark charcoal typography, restrained red/blue/teal accents, thin rules, chart-led evidence aesthetic, generous margins. Medium-high text density, polished presentation page, not a wireframe.

Required visible title: 治理与上线闭环
Required takeaway under title: 上线后要持续监控来源可信、权限越界、风险回答和失败样例。
Must include these exact Chinese module labels: 来源可信, 权限控制, 风险拦截, 效果评估, 灰度上线, 反馈复盘

Layout: Strong editorial hierarchy. Top band with small deck marker “04 / 04” and title. Main visual center: a large closed-loop governance diagram / control matrix hybrid occupying most of the slide. Six stages arranged as a circular loop or rounded rectangular route with arrows: 来源可信 -> 权限控制 -> 风险拦截 -> 效果评估 -> 灰度上线 -> 反馈复盘 -> back to 来源可信. Each stage is a clean separable module with a short readable Chinese explanation:
- 来源可信：校验文档来源、版本与更新状态
- 权限控制：按角色与文档域限制可见范围
- 风险拦截：拦截越权请求、高风险回答与不确定输出
- 效果评估：跟踪检索命中、复核通过与失败样例
- 灰度上线：先小范围试运行，再分批扩大覆盖
- 反馈复盘：沉淀问题清单，回流知识治理与流程配置

Use source-grounded synthetic metrics only, presented clearly as test sample data, not real business outcomes. Add a compact right-side or bottom evidence panel titled “测试样例指标” with four horizontal bars or stat rows using ONLY these values:
文档覆盖率 72%
检索命中率 81%
人工复核通过率 88%
高风险回答拦截率 96%
Add a small readable note: 数值为测试样例数据，不代表真实业务结果。
No other numbers, dates, citations, company names, customer cases, benchmarks, logos, maps, or named entities.

Visual substance: include abstract source-safe document thumbnails, permission boundary grid, shield/check icon style, risk stop marker, evaluation mini-bars, grayscale rollout steps, and feedback loop arrows. Keep all charts and bars based only on supplied values; any background mini charts must be unlabeled abstract shapes. Use crisp module boundaries for downstream segmentation, subtle shadows, thin lines, no busy textures behind text. Full canvas balanced, no cropped content, no overlapping text, no pseudo-writing, no random English headings. Chinese text dominates. Professional editorial typography, high contrast, clean spacing, finished high-impact academic/business overview slide.

images.revised_prompt:
Create one 2048x1152 high-quality opaque PNG, a finished 16:9 PPT slide in Chinese using an infographic_dashboard visual system. Baked text must be rendered directly in the image, crisp and OCR-readable.

Slide topic/page: 第 1/4 页：接入总览 for deck “AI Agent 工作流如何接入企业文档体系”. Audience: 企业管理层、知识管理团队、AI 产品与技术团队.

Overall design: premium enterprise infographic dashboard, light neutral background, Swiss/editorial grid, generous margins, clear module boundaries, high contrast text, subtle shadows, thin rules, 3-5 distinct accent colors with consistent roles. Must feel like a continuous deck page, not a poster or wireframe. Use meaningful dashboard modules, process diagram, icons, schematic mini-panels; avoid random decorative cards. No company logos, no citations, no unsupported dates/market sizes/benchmarks/customer cases.

Required visible Chinese text, large and legible:
Title: “AI Agent 工作流如何接入企业文档体系”
Subtitle/takeaway: “不是把文档丢给模型，而是把知识源、权限、检索和评估接成可控闭环。”
Key labels: “文档接入”, “知识治理”, “权限边界”, “Agent 编排”, “持续评估”.

Recommended layout:
Top header band with small page marker “01 / 接入总览” and the title/subtitle.
Main central area: left-to-right pipeline from enterprise document sources to knowledge index to Agent workflow to governance loop.
- Left bookend: “文档源” with generic document stack icons, folders, wiki/page thumbnails, scanned-document shapes. Body copy: “结构化、半结构化、非结构化文档统一进入接入层”.
- Pipeline stage 1 card: “文档接入” with icon-like ingestion/document parsing visual. Short bullets: “采集与解析”, “格式标准化”.
- Pipeline stage 2 card: “知识治理” with knowledge graph/index visual. Short bullets: “去重、标签、版本”, “质量与元数据”.
- Pipeline stage 3 card: “权限边界” with lock/shield visual. Short bullets: “按角色授权”, “敏感内容隔离”.
- Pipeline stage 4 card: “Agent 编排” with workflow nodes and arrows. Short bullets: “检索增强”, “任务流转”.
- Right bookend: “治理闭环” with circular arrows connecting back to index and workflow, label “持续评估”. Short bullets: “人工复核”, “风险拦截”, “效果评估”.

Bottom dashboard band: four compact metric tiles using only supplied synthetic test metrics, clearly marked as test sample data. Display exact labels and values:
“文档覆盖率 72%”
“检索命中率 81%”
“人工复核通过率 88%”
“高风险回答拦截率 96%”
Add small note in Chinese: “数值为测试样例数据，不代表真实业务结果。”
Use circular progress rings or clean mini bars, no extra invented numbers.

Visual details: clean line icons, rounded rectangles max 8px feel, accent colors such as teal for knowledge/index, blue for workflow, amber for governance/risk, green for evaluation, neutral gray for sources. Use directional arrows and one circular feedback arrow to show controlled closed loop. Include abstract unlabeled mini charts or document thumbnails only where generic and source-safe. Text must not overlap visuals; no pseudo-writing, no mojibake, no random English headings. Main language Chinese; English only for “AI Agent” if in title/technical label. Full canvas balanced, no cropped edges, no large empty areas, no complex texture behind text.

- 不要编造公司名、真实客户案例、市场规模、年份、benchmark 或未给定数字。
- single coherent slide, not a collage of unrelated panels
- use the full 16:9 canvas with balanced density; avoid large accidental empty regions
- presentation polish should be comparable to a manually designed high-impact academic overview slide
- contains enough readable explanatory text to be useful as a PPT slide: title, takeaway, section labels, and concise body copy
- must not look like a layout-only wireframe or unlabeled component scaffold
- clear focal hierarchy with generous margins and no overcrowding
- high contrast between foreground and background
- no overlapping text or visual elements
- no cropped important content near slide edges
- no unreadable microtext, mojibake, pseudo-letters, or random captions
- data-like visuals must be source-grounded or deliberately abstract
- when verified metrics are unavailable, use unlabeled abstract mini-charts or schematic indicators rather than fake numbers
- professional typography and spacing suitable for a 16:9 presentation

Visual richness guidance:
- do not reduce the slide to five plain cards; add source-safe visual substance inside and around the pipeline
- synthetic thumbnails are allowed when they are clearly generic: microscopy-like panels, figure crops, mask overlays, charts, asset swatches, vector nodes, and editable-canvas previews
- unlabeled charts may show abstract trends, bars, or scatter patterns for visual metaphor only; do not add axis labels, numeric values, legends with unsupported method names, or performance claims
- avoid domain-specific imagery such as biomedical cells, molecules, organs, maps, hardware, company products, or clinical scenes unless provided by the source context
- for generic AI/pipeline topics, use neutral paper-figure thumbnails, document crops, layout grids, chart placeholders, mask overlays, UI-free vector diagrams, and editable-canvas previews
- show process transformation visually: raw figure -> detected text/regions -> separated assets -> native shapes -> editable slide output
- use varied panel scale, subtle shadows, thin rules, and accent color blocks to create depth and a finished editorial look
- include enough small visual detail to feel premium, while keeping semantic modules cleanly separable for DrawAI
- if a subtitle is useful, derive it only from the primary request and avoid unsupported claims

Composition guidance:
- 这是一组模板图库横向测试，每张图都必须是完整 PPT 页面，不是海报或纯插画。
- 同一模板的 4 页需要有明显连续 deck 一致性：标题系统、色彩、模块风格、图标/线条语言一致。
- 只根据本页 page_brief 改变页面类型；不要改变总主题。
- 文字应跟随用户输入语言和 visible_text_blocks，不要生成随机英文栏目或伪文字。
- compose like a finished slide, not a sparse wireframe or UI mockup
- use a rich overview structure when appropriate: title plus subtitle, left input bookend, central pipeline, right output bookend, and compact bottom overview band
- for academic or technical topics, prefer a left-to-right pipeline, method/results overview, or evidence hierarchy
- use abstract, source-safe visual evidence when exact datasets are unavailable: synthetic figure thumbnails, module cards, flow arrows, masks, crop examples, schematic charts without numeric labels
- maintain Swiss/editorial discipline: aligned columns, consistent spacing, restrained color accents, and clear typographic scale
- keep every visible label purposeful; do not add decorative pseudo-text to fill space
- make the result feel publication/presentation ready at first glance while preserving factual restraint

DrawAI post-processing constraints:
- 文本区域保持高对比，方便 OCR 识别。
- 模块边界清晰，方便 SAM/DrawAI 后续可编辑重建。
- 避免将语义文字压在复杂纹理、强噪声或低对比渐变上。
- use crisp object boundaries and clean layer separation where possible
- keep text regions high contrast and OCR-friendly if text appears
- avoid textured noise directly behind text or chart labels
- avoid excessive glow, blur, transparency, and low-contrast gradients over semantic content
- prefer simple geometric regions for tables, charts, cards, arrows, and panels
- leave enough spacing for DrawAI to segment text, icons, charts, and decorative assets

Variant instruction:
Create the strongest single version; do not make a collage or compare alternatives inside the image.

Negative constraints:
none

No logos, company names, citations, dates, invented benchmarks, market figures, or unsupported numbers beyond the supplied synthetic metrics if used.

Slide 2/4 of a continuous deck about “AI Agent 工作流如何接入企业文档体系”. Make it look like one page in a consistent management/technical deck, not a poster, not a wireframe.

Title area at top left:
- Large readable title: “文档接入流程”
- Subtitle / takeaway below: “先把文档变成可检索、可追溯、可授权的知识单元，再交给 Agent 调用。”

Main composition: a rich left-to-right process + metrics dashboard.
Use a central horizontal pipeline with six clearly separated nodes connected by arrows. Each node has a simple icon-like visual and short body copy, all in Chinese, high contrast and OCR-friendly:
1. “采集” with generic document stack / connector icon. Body: “汇入企业文档与知识入口”

4. “向量索引” with node graph / search icon. Body: “生成可检索语义索引”
5. “权限绑定” with shield / lock icon. Body: “按角色与文档范围约束调用”
6. “质量检查” with check-circle / inspection icon. Body: “抽检命中、追溯与风险拦截”

Add left bookend panel labeled “输入：企业文档体系” with generic source-safe thumbnails: folders, PDFs, tables, manuals, chat notes, no brand names. Add right bookend panel labeled “输出：Agent 可用知识单元” showing clean knowledge cards, vector nodes, permission badge, trace line; keep it generic.

Add a compact bottom dashboard band with three meaningful modules, not fake claims:

- “质量门禁”: checklist “可追溯 / 可授权 / 可检索 / 可复核”

Design details: use full canvas with generous margins, aligned grid, high contrast text on white/light panels, crisp boundaries for segmentation, subtle depth, refined editorial layout. Avoid complex textures behind text. Avoid microtext, pseudo-writing, random English headings, watermarks, signatures, overlapping elements, cropped content. All visible main text must be Chinese and readable; English only for “Agent” if needed. Make it visually memorable and finished, with clean icons, abstract charts, process transformation visuals, and consistent spacing.

Quality gates to satisfy visually:
- 必须能看出这是连续 deck 的一页。
- 必须包含标题、核心结论/说明、结构化内容区。
- 不要编造公司名、真实客户案例、市场规模、年份、benchmark 或未给定数字。
- single coherent slide, not a collage of unrelated panels
- use the full 16:9 canvas with balanced density; avoid large accidental empty regions
- presentation polish should be comparable to a manually designed high-impact academic overview slide
- contains enough readable explanatory text to be useful as a PPT slide: title, takeaway, section labels, and concise body copy
- must not look like a layout-only wireframe or unlabeled component scaffold
- clear focal hierarchy with generous margins and no overcrowding
- high contrast between foreground and background
- no overlapping text or visual elements
- no cropped important content near slide edges
- no unreadable microtext, mojibake, pseudo-letters, or random captions
- data-like visuals must be source-grounded or deliberately abstract
- when verified metrics are unavailable, use unlabeled abstract mini-charts or schematic indicators rather than fake numbers
- professional typography and spacing suitable for a 16:9 presentation

Visual richness guidance:
- do not reduce the slide to five plain cards; add source-safe visual substance inside and around the pipeline
- synthetic thumbnails are allowed when they are clearly generic: microscopy-like panels, figure crops, mask overlays, charts, asset swatches, vector nodes, and editable-canvas previews
- unlabeled charts may show abstract trends, bars, or scatter patterns for visual metaphor only; do not add axis labels, numeric values, legends with unsupported method names, or performance claims
- avoid domain-specific imagery such as biomedical cells, molecules, organs, maps, hardware, company products, or clinical scenes unless provided by the source context
- for generic AI/pipeline topics, use neutral paper-figure thumbnails, document crops, layout grids, chart placeholders, mask overlays, UI-free vector diagrams, and editable-canvas previews
- show process transformation visually: raw figure -> detected text/regions -> separated assets -> native shapes -> editable slide output
- use varied panel scale, subtle shadows, thin rules, and accent color blocks to create depth and a finished editorial look
- include enough small visual detail to feel premium, while keeping semantic modules cleanly separable for DrawAI
- if a subtitle is useful, derive it only from the primary request and avoid unsupported claims

Composition guidance:
- 这是一组模板图库横向测试，每张图都必须是完整 PPT 页面，不是海报或纯插画。
- 同一模板的 4 页需要有明显连续 deck 一致性：标题系统、色彩、模块风格、图标/线条语言一致。
- 只根据本页 page_brief 改变页面类型；不要改变总主题。
- 文字应跟随用户输入语言和 visible_text_blocks，不要生成随机英文栏目或伪文字。
- compose like a finished slide, not a sparse wireframe or UI mockup
- use a rich overview structure when appropriate: title plus subtitle, left input bookend, central pipeline, right output bookend, and compact bottom overview band
- for academic or technical topics, prefer a left-to-right pipeline, method/results overview, or evidence hierarchy
- use abstract, source-safe visual evidence when exact datasets are unavailable: synthetic figure thumbnails, module cards, flow arrows, masks, crop examples, schematic charts without numeric labels
- maintain Swiss/editorial discipline: aligned columns, consistent spacing, restrained color accents, and clear typographic scale
- keep every visible label purposeful; do not add decorative pseudo-text to fill space
- make the result feel publication/presentation ready at first glance while preserving factual restraint

DrawAI post-processing constraints:
- 文本区域保持高对比，方便 OCR 识别。
- 模块边界清晰，方便 SAM/DrawAI 后续可编辑重建。
- 避免将语义文字压在复杂纹理、强噪声或低对比渐变上。
- use crisp object boundaries and clean layer separation where possible
- keep text regions high contrast and OCR-friendly if text appears
- avoid textured noise directly behind text or chart labels
- avoid excessive glow, blur, transparency, and low-contrast gradients over semantic content
- prefer simple geometric regions for tables, charts, cards, arrows, and panels
- leave enough spacing for DrawAI to segment text, icons, charts, and decorative assets

Variant instruction:
Create the strongest single version; do not make a collage or compare alternatives inside the image.

Negative constraints:
none

Final response contract: reply only {"generated": true}.

images.revised_prompt:
2048x1152 high-quality opaque PNG, premium slide-ready 16:9 PPT bitmap, Chinese infographic dashboard template continuity. Create page 4/4 of a deck titled about AI Agent workflow connecting to enterprise document systems. Main slide title in large readable Chinese: “治理与上线闭环”. Subtitle/takeaway directly under title: “上线后要持续监控来源可信、权限越界、风险回答和失败样例。”

Visual style: polished Infographic Dashboard, light neutral background, Swiss editorial grid, generous margins, crisp module boundaries, high contrast OCR-friendly text, clean vector-like icons, subtle shadows, thin rules, 3-5 semantic accent colors: teal for trust/source, blue for permissions, red/orange for risk, green for evaluation, purple/indigo for rollout/feedback. Avoid logos, company names, citations, fake benchmarks, fake years. All text primarily Chinese. No pseudo-writing.

Composition: complete PPT explanation page, not wireframe. Top header bar with small page marker “04 / 04” and theme label “AI Agent × 企业文档体系”. Center of slide: a large closed-loop governance diagram made of six clearly separated rounded modules connected clockwise by arrows around a central hub labeled “上线治理中枢”. Six modules must contain these exact Chinese headers, readable and prominent: “来源可信”, “权限控制”, “风险拦截”, “效果评估”, “灰度上线”, “反馈复盘”. Each module includes a small simple icon and 1-2 concise Chinese body bullets derived only from the prompt/context:
- 来源可信: “校验文档来源与版本” “保留引用链路”
- 权限控制: “按角色限定可见范围” “拦截越界访问”
- 风险拦截: “识别高风险回答” “转人工复核”
- 效果评估: “检索命中与复核结果” “失败样例沉淀”
- 灰度上线: “小范围试运行” “逐步扩大使用场景”
- 反馈复盘: “收集用户反馈” “回流治理规则”

Right side or lower band: compact metric dashboard strip using only supplied synthetic test metrics. Include four KPI tiles with exact values and note that values are test examples. Text:
“文档覆盖率 72%”
“检索命中率 81%”
“人工复核通过率 88%”
“高风险回答拦截率 96%”
Small footnote in Chinese, readable but secondary: “注：数值为测试样例数据，不代表真实业务结果。” Use mini progress rings/bars for these four metrics only; no other numbers.

Left side: small source-safe governance control matrix with three rows, three columns, qualitative status chips, no extra numbers. Headers: “控制项”, “上线前”, “上线后”. Rows: “权限边界”, “来源质量”, “风险回答”. Chips use Chinese qualitative labels like “校验”, “监控”, “复盘”. Keep table clean and readable.

Overall hierarchy: title and takeaway first, central loop as focal element, dashboard metrics as supporting proof, matrix as governance checklist. Balanced density, no overlapping elements, no cropped content, enough whitespace, professional typography suitable for enterprise management, knowledge management, AI product and technical teams. Use abstract document thumbnails, nodes, shield/check icons, alert triangle, gauge icons; no domain-specific imagery, no real UI screenshots, no random English labels. Make it look like one coherent slide from a continuous deck, polished and finished.

- Finished PPT page, not a wireframe. Full 16:9 canvas with generous margins and clear hierarchy.
- Top title system: small section marker at top-left, large title, concise takeaway below title on a clean white area.
- Main body: left-to-right high-level pipeline with five connected modules:
  1. 文档接入: show generic document-source stack icon/thumbnail, with concise bullets: "多源文档统一接入" and "保留元数据与版本线索"
  2. 知识治理: show generic paper-figure/grid thumbnails and mask overlays, bullets: "清洗、分块、标签化" and "形成可追溯知识索引"
  3. 权限边界: show shield/lock boundary ring, bullets: "按用户与场景授权" and "敏感内容受控访问"
  4. Agent 编排: show flow nodes connected to a central agent/workflow symbol, bullets: "检索增强 + 工具调用" and "任务流可审计"
  5. 持续评估: show feedback loop arrow and review/check panel, bullets: "人工复核与风险拦截" and "评估结果回流治理"
- Use thin arrows and a subtle teal/blue knowledge-index ribbon flowing from left to right, then looping back from 持续评估 to 知识治理 to show governance closed loop.

  "文档覆盖率 72%", "检索命中率 81%", "人工复核通过率 88%", "高风险回答拦截率 96%".
  Make these look like small academic result chips or mini cards with simple progress bars; include the note "测试样例数据，不代表真实业务结果" in the same band.
- Add a small right-side "治理闭环" callout explaining: "接入、索引、权限、执行与评估共同约束 Agent 输出".
- Use generic source-safe visual evidence only: document crops, neutral chart placeholders, editable-canvas style grids, vector nodes, abstract mini-charts. Avoid biomedical, molecular, maps, hardware, real product UI, logos.

- Main language Chinese. Preserve English only in "AI Agent".
- High-contrast charcoal on white. Text must be crisp and large enough for slide thumbnail. No pseudo-writing, no random English headings, no tiny unreadable captions.
- Keep module boundaries crisp for downstream segmentation: each module is a clearly separated card/panel with thin rules, subtle shadows, and consistent 8px or less radius.
- Do not overlap text with textures or arrows. No cropped content near edges.

Visual tone:
- Premium academic/editorial slide, balanced narrative text and visuals, strong first-glance impact. Refined palette: white, charcoal, light blue, teal, small amber highlights. No dark blurred background, no one-note purple gradients, no decorative bokeh/orbs.

Output exactly one complete slide image.

{"claims": ["企业文档体系接入 Agent 的关键环节包括文档接入、知识治理、权限边界、检索增强、工作流编排和持续评估。", "所有数值仅为测试样例数据，不代表真实业务结果。"], "primary_request": "用户输入：生成《AI Agent 工作流如何接入企业文档体系》的PPT\n请生成第 2/4 页：文档接入流程。\n流程页：展示文档采集、清洗分块、元数据标注、向量索引、权限绑定和质量检查。可以使用横向流程、泳道图、节点链路或模板适配的等价结构。", "research_context": null}

Quality gates to satisfy visually:
- 必须能看出这是连续 deck 的一页。
- 必须包含标题、核心结论/说明、结构化内容区。
- 不要编造公司名、真实客户案例、市场规模、年份、benchmark 或未给定数字。
- single coherent slide, not a collage of unrelated panels
- use the full 16:9 canvas with balanced density; avoid large accidental empty regions
- presentation polish should be comparable to a manually designed high-impact academic overview slide
- contains enough readable explanatory text to be useful as a PPT slide: title, takeaway, section labels, and concise body copy
- must not look like a layout-only wireframe or unlabeled component scaffold
- clear focal hierarchy with generous margins and no overcrowding
- high contrast between foreground and background
- no overlapping text or visual elements
- no cropped important content near slide edges
- no unreadable microtext, mojibake, pseudo-letters, or random captions
- data-like visuals must be source-grounded or deliberately abstract
- when verified metrics are unavailable, use unlabeled abstract mini-charts or schematic indicators rather than fake numbers
- professional typography and spacing suitable for a 16:9 presentation

Visual richness guidance:
- do not reduce the slide to five plain cards; add source-safe visual substance inside and around the pipeline
- synthetic thumbnails are allowed when they are clearly generic: microscopy-like panels, figure crops, mask overlays, charts, asset swatches, vector nodes, and editable-canvas previews
- unlabeled charts may show abstract trends, bars, or scatter patterns for visual metaphor only; do not add axis labels, numeric values, legends with unsupported method names, or performance claims
- avoid domain-specific imagery such as biomedical cells, molecules, organs, maps, hardware, company products, or clinical scenes unless provided by the source context
- for generic AI/pipeline topics, use neutral paper-figure thumbnails, document crops, layout grids, chart placeholders, mask overlays, UI-free vector diagrams, and editable-canvas previews
- show process transformation visually: raw figure -> detected text/regions -> separated assets -> native shapes -> editable slide output
- use varied panel scale, subtle shadows, thin rules, and accent color blocks to create depth and a finished editorial look
- include enough small visual detail to feel premium, while keeping semantic modules cleanly separable for DrawAI
- if a subtitle is useful, derive it only from the primary request and avoid unsupported claims

Composition guidance:
- 这是一组模板图库横向测试，每张图都必须是完整 PPT 页面，不是海报或纯插画。
- 同一模板的 4 页需要有明显连续 deck 一致性：标题系统、色彩、模块风格、图标/线条语言一致。
- 只根据本页 page_brief 改变页面类型；不要改变总主题。
- 文字应跟随用户输入语言和 visible_text_blocks，不要生成随机英文栏目或伪文字。
- compose like a finished slide, not a sparse wireframe or UI mockup
- use a rich overview structure when appropriate: title plus subtitle, left input bookend, central pipeline, right output bookend, and compact bottom overview band
- for academic or technical topics, prefer a left-to-right pipeline, method/results overview, or evidence hierarchy
- use abstract, source-safe visual evidence when exact datasets are unavailable: synthetic figure thumbnails, module cards, flow arrows, masks, crop examples, schematic charts without numeric labels
- maintain Swiss/editorial discipline: aligned columns, consistent spacing, restrained color accents, and clear typographic scale
- keep every visible label purposeful; do not add decorative pseudo-text to fill space
- make the result feel publication/presentation ready at first glance while preserving factual restraint

DrawAI post-processing constraints:
- 文本区域保持高对比，方便 OCR 识别。
- 模块边界清晰，方便 SAM/DrawAI 后续可编辑重建。
- 避免将语义文字压在复杂纹理、强噪声或低对比渐变上。
- use crisp object boundaries and clean layer separation where possible
- keep text regions high contrast and OCR-friendly if text appears
- avoid textured noise directly behind text or chart labels
- avoid excessive glow, blur, transparency, and low-contrast gradients over semantic content
- prefer simple geometric regions for tables, charts, cards, arrows, and panels
- leave enough spacing for DrawAI to segment text, icons, charts, and decorative assets

Variant instruction:
Create the strongest single version; do not make a collage or compare alternatives inside the image.

Negative constraints:
none

Final response contract: reply only {"generated": true}.

images.revised_prompt:
DrawAI high-quality PPT slide image, 2048x1152, PNG, opaque background. Create one premium finished 16:9 PowerPoint slide in Chinese for page 2/4 of a deck titled AI Agent 工作流如何接入企业文档体系. Template visual system: Nature Paper Briefing, academic briefing style, white base, charcoal text, refined blue, teal, amber accents, restrained publication polish, medium-high text density, clean Swiss editorial alignment, high OCR readability.

Slide title at top left: 文档接入流程
Small page marker at top right: 02 / 04
Subtitle/takeaway under title, exact readable Chinese: 先把文档变成可检索、可追溯、可授权的知识单元，再交给 Agent 调用。

Main layout: finished process explanation page, not a wireframe. Use a left-to-right enterprise document ingestion pipeline across the middle with six clear, separable modules connected by thin arrows and accent nodes. Each module is a clean paper-like card/panel with icon-like abstract visuals and concise Chinese body copy. Required labels must be large and readable:
1. 采集 - 多源文档汇入；保留来源与版本线索
2. 清洗分块 - 去重、清理版式；切成稳定知识片段
3. 元数据标注 - 标注主题、部门、时间、来源等字段
4. 向量索引 - 建立语义检索入口；支持召回与排序
5. 权限绑定 - 继承访问边界；按角色控制可见范围
6. 质量检查 - 抽检命中、权限、可追溯性与风险输出

Visual bookends: left side small stack of generic enterprise documents, PDFs, spreadsheets, wiki pages as abstract paper thumbnails with no logos or company names. Right side output bookend: a clean knowledge-unit stack feeding an abstract Agent workflow node, labeled: 可检索 / 可追溯 / 可授权. Avoid product UI and real brand marks.

Bottom band: compact academic evidence-style overview with three small high-contrast callout boxes, Chinese text only, source-grounded:
- 知识治理：文档接入后进入统一分块、标注与索引规则
- 权限边界：检索结果必须继承企业文档体系的访问控制
- 持续评估：质量检查覆盖检索、权限与高风险回答拦截
Include a small footnote in bottom right: 注：数值若出现仅为测试样例数据，不代表真实业务结果。 Prefer no numeric charts; if using miniature charts, make them abstract and unlabeled.

Design details: generous margins, high contrast, crisp vector-like lines, subtle shadows, thin rules, refined blue/teal/amber accents, module boundaries clear for segmentation. Use generic paper figure thumbnails, schematic crops, mask overlays, layout grids, abstract bars without numbers. No fake citations, no dates, no market sizes, no company names, no logos, no benchmarks. Chinese dominant; English only for Agent as a technical term. Ensure no mojibake, no pseudo-writing, no overlapping text, no cropped content, no unreadable microtext. Make it a single coherent premium PPT slide with title, takeaway, structured content, and polished academic presentation feel.

- Produce one premium slide-ready bitmap image for a PPT workflow.

- Optimize for visual quality, factual restraint, clear structure, OCR-readability, and downstream segmentation.
- Default rendering mode is baked_text: render complete title, body copy, diagrams, charts, and visual structure directly inside the final bitmap.
- Do not trade away presentation beauty for caution: keep the slide visually memorable, premium, and finished while staying source-grounded.

- Use the built-in Codex image generation tool for exactly one output image.

Build a clear left-to-right workflow architecture with labeled stages and connecting arrows, showing user question flowing through Agent workflow into answer and feedback. Main horizontal pipeline across center: 用户问题 → 意图识别 → 检索增强 → 工具调用 → 答案生成 → 引用回溯 → 人工反馈. Each stage should be a distinct clean card/node with icon-like abstract glyphs, thin outline, and accent color markers. Use larger central focus around “检索增强” and “工具调用” to make architecture concrete.

Add a structured enterprise document system layer beneath the pipeline: four source-safe blocks labeled “文档接入”, “知识治理”, “权限边界”, “持续评估”. Connect them subtly to the relevant pipeline stages using thin teal/amber lines, showing that RAG retrieval and tool invocation depend on governed document sources and permissions. Add concise readable body copy callouts derived only from supplied facts:
- “文档进入知识库前先治理结构、版本与权限。”
- “RAG 检索返回片段与来源，供答案生成引用。”
- “工具调用需经过权限边界与风险策略。”
- “反馈结果进入评估闭环，改进检索与编排。”
Include a small note in bottom-right or footer: “注：架构与指标为测试样例，不代表真实业务结果。”

Use generic paper-figure visual substance only: small abstract document thumbnails, cropped text blocks, vector nodes, simple unlabeled mini-bars and mask overlays without invented values. Since supplied metrics are available, include a compact right-side or bottom metric strip with exactly these test values and labels, clearly marked as test sample: “文档覆盖率 72%”, “检索命中率 81%”, “人工复核通过率 88%”, “高风险回答拦截率 96%”. Do not add any other numbers. Make metric strip secondary, not the main focus.

Layout style: academic briefing, claim + figure logic map. Top-left title system, small page marker “03 / 04” allowed. Main architecture region should be cleanly separable for DrawAI segmentation. Use crisp rectangles with subtle shadows, thin dividers, amber emphasis tag for state retention, blue/teal arrows, charcoal text. Avoid complex textures behind text, excessive glow, blur, or low contrast. All Chinese text must be legible, no mojibake, no fake filler, no random English headings. Keep English only for standard terms “Agent” and “RAG”. Ensure no text overlaps, nothing cropped near edges, and the result reads as a complete polished slide.

- no cropped important content near slide edges

- data-like visuals must be source-grounded or deliberately abstract

- if a subtitle is useful, derive it only from the primary request and avoid unsupported claims

Composition guidance:
- 这是一组模板图库横向测试，每张图都必须是完整 PPT 页面，不是海报或纯插画。
- 同一模板的 4 页需要有明显连续 deck 一致性：标题系统、色彩、模块风格、图标/线条语言一致。
- 只根据本页 page_brief 改变页面类型；不要改变总主题。

- compose like a finished slide, not a sparse wireframe or UI mockup
- use a rich overview structure when appropriate: title plus subtitle, left input bookend, central pipeline, right output bookend, and compact bottom overview band
- for academic or technical topics, prefer a left-to-right pipeline, method/results overview, or evidence hierarchy
- use abstract, source-safe visual evidence when exact datasets are unavailable: synthetic figure thumbnails, module cards, flow arrows, masks, crop examples, schematic charts without numeric labels
- maintain Swiss/editorial discipline: aligned columns, consistent spacing, restrained color accents, and clear typographic scale
- keep every visible label purposeful; do not add decorative pseudo-text to fill space
- make the result feel publication/presentation ready at first glance while preserving factual restraint

DrawAI post-processing constraints:
- 文本区域保持高对比，方便 OCR 识别。
- 模块边界清晰，方便 SAM/DrawAI 后续可编辑重建。

- keep text regions high contrast and OCR-friendly if text appears
- avoid textured noise directly behind text or chart labels
- avoid excessive glow, blur, transparency, and low-contrast gradients over semantic content
- prefer simple geometric regions for tables, charts, cards, arrows, and panels
- leave enough spacing for DrawAI to segment text, icons, charts, and decorative assets

none

Visible text and body-copy policy:
- Render a normal PPT explanation page: include required visible content, then add concise source-grounded body copy from the primary request, claims, and visible_text_blocks. Text must be readable, useful, and large enough for a slide thumbnail. Preserve the user's language unless the user explicitly asks for another language.
- text_density: medium
- main_language: Chinese. Use Chinese for the main title, subtitle, section headers, bullets, callouts, captions, warnings, and takeaway text.
- Keep English only for model/product/API names, acronyms, code identifiers, benchmark names, and standard technical terms where Chinese translation would be unnatural.
- Do not render generic English section headings. Use Chinese headings such as 核心结论、来源质量、威胁模型、记忆分层、状态表示、技术栈、风险边界.
- If REQUIRED_VISIBLE_TEXT contains English generic descriptors, treat them as semantic hints and render concise Chinese equivalents unless they also appear in EXACT_TEXT_DO_NOT_TRANSLATE.
- A mixed Chinese/English technical slide is acceptable only when the Chinese text remains dominant and explanatory.
- Match the language of the primary request and supplied visible text. If the request is Chinese, render Chinese slide copy; preserve model names, APIs, metrics, and technical terms in English only where they are proper nouns or standard terms.
- Do not translate Chinese headings, bullets, or speaker-facing explanations into English unless the user explicitly requests English.
- Required visible text is a floor, not a ceiling: do not reduce the slide to labels and layout only.
- Minimum useful text: a clear title, subtitle or takeaway when supplied, readable section/module labels, and 3-6 concise explanatory bullets or callouts.
- For medium-density technical PPT pages, use normal slide copy density: enough text to explain the idea at a glance while preserving spacing.
- Body copy may paraphrase only the primary request, supplied claims, visible_text_blocks, and source-grounded context.
- Avoid tiny text, gibberish, pseudo-writing, watermark-like marks, signatures, random labels, and unreadable micro-captions.
- If exact long text rendering is risky, split it into shorter readable bullets or callouts; never leave the slide textless.

Quality gates to satisfy visually:
- 必须能看出这是连续 deck 的一页。
- 必须包含标题、核心结论/说明、结构化内容区。
- 不要编造公司名、真实客户案例、市场规模、年份、benchmark 或未给定数字。
- single coherent slide, not a collage of unrelated panels
- use the full 16:9 canvas with balanced density; avoid large accidental empty regions
- presentation polish should be comparable to a manually designed high-impact academic overview slide
- contains enough readable explanatory text to be useful as a PPT slide: title, takeaway, section labels, and concise body copy
- must not look like a layout-only wireframe or unlabeled component scaffold
- clear focal hierarchy with generous margins and no overcrowding
- high contrast between foreground and background
- no overlapping text or visual elements
- no cropped important content near slide edges
- no unreadable microtext, mojibake, pseudo-letters, or random captions
- data-like visuals must be source-grounded or deliberately abstract
- when verified metrics are unavailable, use unlabeled abstract mini-charts or schematic indicators rather than fake numbers
- professional typography and spacing suitable for a 16:9 presentation

Visual richness guidance:
- do not reduce the slide to five plain cards; add source-safe visual substance inside and around the pipeline
- synthetic thumbnails are allowed when they are clearly generic: microscopy-like panels, figure crops, mask overlays, charts, asset swatches, vector nodes, and editable-canvas previews
- unlabeled charts may show abstract trends, bars, or scatter patterns for visual metaphor only; do not add axis labels, numeric values, legends with unsupported method names, or performance claims
- avoid domain-specific imagery such as biomedical cells, molecules, organs, maps, hardware, company products, or clinical scenes unless provided by the source context
- for generic AI/pipeline topics, use neutral paper-figure thumbnails, document crops, layout grids, chart placeholders, mask overlays, UI-free vector diagrams, and editable-canvas previews
- show process transformation visually: raw figure -> detected text/regions -> separated assets -> native shapes -> editable slide output
- use varied panel scale, subtle shadows, thin rules, and accent color blocks to create depth and a finished editorial look
- include enough small visual detail to feel premium, while keeping semantic modules cleanly separable for DrawAI
- if a subtitle is useful, derive it only from the primary request and avoid unsupported claims

Composition guidance:
- 这是一组模板图库横向测试，每张图都必须是完整 PPT 页面，不是海报或纯插画。
- 同一模板的 4 页需要有明显连续 deck 一致性：标题系统、色彩、模块风格、图标/线条语言一致。
- 只根据本页 page_brief 改变页面类型；不要改变总主题。
- 文字应跟随用户输入语言和 visible_text_blocks，不要生成随机英文栏目或伪文字。
- compose like a finished slide, not a sparse wireframe or UI mockup
- use a rich overview structure when appropriate: title plus subtitle, left input bookend, central pipeline, right output bookend, and compact bottom overview band
- for academic or technical topics, prefer a left-to-right pipeline, method/results overview, or evidence hierarchy
- use abstract, source-safe visual evidence when exact datasets are unavailable: synthetic figure thumbnails, module cards, flow arrows, masks, crop examples, schematic charts without numeric labels
- maintain Swiss/editorial discipline: aligned columns, consistent spacing, restrained color accents, and clear typographic scale
- keep every visible label purposeful; do not add decorative pseudo-text to fill space
- make the result feel publication/presentation ready at first glance while preserving factual restraint

DrawAI post-processing constraints:
- 文本区域保持高对比，方便 OCR 识别。
- 模块边界清晰，方便 SAM/DrawAI 后续可编辑重建。
- 避免将语义文字压在复杂纹理、强噪声或低对比渐变上。
- use crisp object boundaries and clean layer separation where possible
- keep text regions high contrast and OCR-friendly if text appears
- avoid textured noise directly behind text or chart labels
- avoid excessive glow, blur, transparency, and low-contrast gradients over semantic content
- prefer simple geometric regions for tables, charts, cards, arrows, and panels
- leave enough spacing for DrawAI to segment text, icons, charts, and decorative assets

Variant instruction:
Create the strongest single version; do not make a collage or compare alternatives inside the image.

Negative constraints:
none

Final response contract: reply only {"generated": true}.

images.revised_prompt:
2048x1152 high-quality opaque PNG, premium finished 16:9 PPT slide, Courseware Explainer template visual system: light friendly base, blue and green accents, clean dividers, instructional courseware page, medium text density, plain readable Chinese typography, large labels, short bullets, crisp object boundaries for downstream segmentation.

Slide 1/4 overview page in Chinese. Render all text baked into the image, readable and OCR-friendly, no pseudo-writing. No logos, company names, citations, dates, market claims, fake benchmarks, or unsupported numbers beyond the provided test metrics. All metrics must be explicitly framed as test sample data.

Title at top left: “AI Agent 工作流如何接入企业文档体系”
Small page marker near top right: “01 / 04  接入总览”
Takeaway subtitle under title in a highlighted pale-blue band: “不是把文档丢给模型，而是把知识源、权限、检索和评估接成可控闭环。”

Composition: polished academic/enterprise training slide. Use full canvas with generous margins. Left-to-right high-level pipeline as the main focal structure across the center: 
1. 文档接入
2. 知识治理
3. 权限边界
4. Agent 编排
5. 持续评估
Connect modules with clear blue/green arrows and a subtle circular feedback loop from 持续评估 back to 知识治理.

Each pipeline module should be a clean separated rounded rectangle or structured panel with a simple line icon and 1-2 concise Chinese bullets:
文档接入: “统一接入文档源” “保留来源与版本线索”
知识治理: “清洗、切分、索引” “形成可检索知识层”
权限边界: “按角色限定可见范围” “敏感内容先过滤”
Agent 编排: “检索增强 + 工具调用” “按流程生成可追溯回答”
持续评估: “人工复核与风险拦截” “结果回流治理规则”

Add a left bookend visual labeled “企业文档源”: generic document stacks, folders, wiki pages, policy pages, tables; no product UI or logos. Add a right bookend visual labeled “可控 Agent 工作流”: generic workflow nodes, answer card, checklist, approval step; no real UI brand.

Bottom overview band with four compact metric tiles using the supplied synthetic test metrics only. Header: “测试样例指标（非真实业务结果）”. Tiles:
“文档覆盖率 72%”
“检索命中率 81%”
“人工复核通过率 88%”
“高风险回答拦截率 96%”
Use simple mini progress rings or bars, clearly marked as sample/test, no other numbers.

Visual style details: warm off-white background, subtle grid or teaching-paper texture only in non-text areas, thin blue dividers, green accent checkpoints, mild shadows, clean layer separation, high contrast text, modular panels separated enough for SAM/DrawAI reconstruction. Include a small “核心逻辑” callout near the pipeline: “文档源 → 知识索引 → Agent 工作流 → 治理闭环”. Avoid overcrowding, avoid dark blurry gradients, avoid random English headings, avoid illegible microtext, avoid overlapping text, keep all important content away from edges.

generation.prompt:
DrawAI high-quality PPT slide image request.

Goal:
- Produce one premium slide-ready bitmap image for a PPT workflow.
- The image may be non-editable; it will later pass through DrawAI's editable reconstruction pipeline.
- Optimize for visual quality, factual restraint, clear structure, OCR-readability, and downstream segmentation.
- Default rendering mode is baked_text: render complete title, body copy, diagrams, charts, and visual structure directly inside the final bitmap.
- Do not trade away presentation beauty for caution: keep the slide visually memorable, premium, and finished while staying source-grounded.

Mandatory tool behavior:
- Use the built-in Codex image generation tool for exactly one output image.
- Do not call OpenAI Images API manually.
- Do not use shell commands, web search, MCP tools, or multi-agent delegation in this image-generation turn.

Primary request:
用户输入：生成《AI Agent 工作流如何接入企业文档体系》的PPT
请生成第 2/4 页：文档接入流程。
流程页：展示文档采集、清洗分块、元数据标注、向量索引、权限绑定和质量检查。可以使用横向流程、泳道图、节点链路或模板适配的等价结构。

Generation settings:
- size: 2048x1152
- quality: high
- background: opaque
- output_format: png

Slide intent:
- mode: image_first_ppt_slide
- type: process
- audience: 企业管理层、知识管理团队、AI 产品与技术团队

Design direction:
- style: 使用模板 courseware_explainer 的视觉系统。该模板用途：structured course slides, onboarding modules, training decks, concept lessons。视觉方向：template-specific slide design。本页是连续 deck 的第 2/4 页，必须与同模板其他页面保持色彩、字体层级、图形语言和边距一致。
- template_id: courseware_explainer
- design_principles: ["finished PPT explanation page, not a bare layout scaffold", "balanced narrative text and visuals", "source-grounded factual content", "clear hierarchy with readable body copy", "high visual ambition with a polished first-glance impact"]

Template effect card:
- none: use the selected strategy template only.

Reference execution mode:
- reference_mode: auto

Must feel like a finished PPT explanation page, not a wireframe.

Main title at top left: “文档接入流程”. Small page marker near title area: “02 / 04”. Subtitle/takeaway below title, exactly readable: “先把文档变成可检索、可追溯、可授权的知识单元，再交给 Agent 调用。”

Composition: full-slide structured process layout with generous margins. Use a left-to-right pipeline as the main focal area across the middle, with six clearly separated modules connected by clean arrows or node links. Required module labels, in order and readable: “采集”, “清洗分块”, “元数据标注”, “向量索引”, “权限绑定”, “质量检查”. Each module should include a simple source-safe icon/diagram and one concise Chinese explanation line:
1. 采集：汇入文档、表格、知识库
2. 清洗分块：去重清洗，切成知识片段
3. 元数据标注：标注来源、版本、主题
4. 向量索引：建立语义检索入口
5. 权限绑定：继承角色与访问边界
6. 质量检查：抽检命中、追溯与风险

Use generic document thumbnails and abstract vector diagrams only. No company names, logos, market claims, dates, citations, maps, benchmarks, customer cases, or unsupported numbers. Avoid fake metrics. If using mini charts, keep them abstract and unlabeled with no numeric values.

Add instructional structure around the pipeline: a small left bookend panel labeled “输入” showing generic raw document stacks and folders; a small right bookend panel labeled “输出” showing “可检索知识单元” and “Agent 可调用”. Add a compact bottom band titled “接入检查点” with three short bullets: “来源可追溯”, “权限可继承”, “质量可复核”. Also include a tiny footnote in high contrast but not dominant: “数值仅为测试样例时才可展示；本页不使用真实业务指标。”

Visual style details: light off-white background, crisp white cards with subtle shadow, thin blue dividers, green accent check marks, rounded rectangles no more than 8px radius, modular object boundaries for downstream segmentation. Use simple line icons: document import, scissors/block chunks, tag, vector nodes, shield/lock, checklist. Maintain clear hierarchy, high contrast text, no text over complex textures, no overlap, no cropped elements. Chinese text must be legible, no mojibake, no pseudo-writing, no random English headings. Use full canvas with balanced density and polished presentation look.

Main title at top left: “Agent 工作流架构”. Under title, render takeaway sentence clearly: “Agent 需要在意图识别、检索增强、工具调用和引用回溯之间保持状态。” Add small page marker at top right: “03 / 04”.

Central composition: a clear left-to-right workflow pipeline with labeled modular cards connected by directional arrows. Required labels exactly in Chinese and readable:
1. “用户问题” as left input bookend, with simple question bubble/document icon.
2. “意图识别” module, showing a small branching intent/routing symbol.
3. “检索增强” module, include “RAG” as small technical tag, with generic document stack and search lens icon; no company logos.
4. “工具调用” module, with neutral tool/API node icon.
5. “答案生成” module, with structured response panel icon.
6. “引用回溯” module, with citation/link-back document markers.
7. “人工反馈” module as right/lower feedback loop, connected back to earlier workflow with a curved arrow.

Show state continuity visually: a thin blue-green “状态上下文” ribbon or lane running beneath the workflow modules, connecting intent recognition, retrieval augmentation, tool calling, answer generation, and citation tracing. Keep label readable: “状态上下文”.

Include a compact bottom overview band titled “接入企业文档体系的关键边界” with 4-6 short Chinese chips or bullets derived only from supplied claims: “文档接入”, “知识治理”, “权限边界”, “工作流编排”, “持续评估”. Include a small note in low emphasis but readable: “数值仅为测试样例，不代表真实业务结果。” Do not add unsupported metrics unless using the supplied sample metrics; preferably omit numeric charts or use abstract unlabeled schematic indicators only.

Visual richness: use subtle shadows, thin rules, soft rounded rectangles with 8px-like radius, small generic document thumbnails, abstract mini document crops, simple icons, blue/green accent blocks, clean white panels on very pale blue background. Add one small side callout near retrieval/citation area: “检索结果必须可追溯到文档来源”. Add one small callout near feedback loop: “人工反馈用于优化策略与知识治理”.

No fake logos, no company names, no dates, no citations, no market claims, no random English headings, no pseudo text, no mojibake. Chinese text must dominate. Avoid complex texture behind text. Balanced density, polished editorial courseware page, clear hierarchy, no overlapping text, no cropped important content.

- 必须能看出这是连续 deck 的一页。
- 必须包含标题、核心结论/说明、结构化内容区。
- 不要编造公司名、真实客户案例、市场规模、年份、benchmark 或未给定数字。

- clear focal hierarchy with generous margins and no overcrowding
- high contrast between foreground and background
- no overlapping text or visual elements
- no cropped important content near slide edges
- no unreadable microtext, mojibake, pseudo-letters, or random captions
- data-like visuals must be source-grounded or deliberately abstract
- when verified metrics are unavailable, use unlabeled abstract mini-charts or schematic indicators rather than fake numbers
- professional typography and spacing suitable for a 16:9 presentation

Visual richness guidance:
- do not reduce the slide to five plain cards; add source-safe visual substance inside and around the pipeline
- synthetic thumbnails are allowed when they are clearly generic: microscopy-like panels, figure crops, mask overlays, charts, asset swatches, vector nodes, and editable-canvas previews
- unlabeled charts may show abstract trends, bars, or scatter patterns for visual metaphor only; do not add axis labels, numeric values, legends with unsupported method names, or performance claims
- avoid domain-specific imagery such as biomedical cells, molecules, organs, maps, hardware, company products, or clinical scenes unless provided by the source context
- for generic AI/pipeline topics, use neutral paper-figure thumbnails, document crops, layout grids, chart placeholders, mask overlays, UI-free vector diagrams, and editable-canvas previews
- show process transformation visually: raw figure -> detected text/regions -> separated assets -> native shapes -> editable slide output
- use varied panel scale, subtle shadows, thin rules, and accent color blocks to create depth and a finished editorial look
- include enough small visual detail to feel premium, while keeping semantic modules cleanly separable for DrawAI
- if a subtitle is useful, derive it only from the primary request and avoid unsupported claims

Composition guidance:
- 这是一组模板图库横向测试，每张图都必须是完整 PPT 页面，不是海报或纯插画。
- 同一模板的 4 页需要有明显连续 deck 一致性：标题系统、色彩、模块风格、图标/线条语言一致。
- 只根据本页 page_brief 改变页面类型；不要改变总主题。
- 文字应跟随用户输入语言和 visible_text_blocks，不要生成随机英文栏目或伪文字。
- compose like a finished slide, not a sparse wireframe or UI mockup
- use a rich overview structure when appropriate: title plus subtitle, left input bookend, central pipeline, right output bookend, and compact bottom overview band
- for academic or technical topics, prefer a left-to-right pipeline, method/results overview, or evidence hierarchy
- use abstract, source-safe visual evidence when exact datasets are unavailable: synthetic figure thumbnails, module cards, flow arrows, masks, crop examples, schematic charts without numeric labels
- maintain Swiss/editorial discipline: aligned columns, consistent spacing, restrained color accents, and clear typographic scale
- keep every visible label purposeful; do not add decorative pseudo-text to fill space
- make the result feel publication/presentation ready at first glance while preserving factual restraint

DrawAI post-processing constraints:
- 文本区域保持高对比，方便 OCR 识别。
- 模块边界清晰，方便 SAM/DrawAI 后续可编辑重建。
- 避免将语义文字压在复杂纹理、强噪声或低对比渐变上。
- use crisp object boundaries and clean layer separation where possible
- keep text regions high contrast and OCR-friendly if text appears
- avoid textured noise directly behind text or chart labels
- avoid excessive glow, blur, transparency, and low-contrast gradients over semantic content
- prefer simple geometric regions for tables, charts, cards, arrows, and panels
- leave enough spacing for DrawAI to segment text, icons, charts, and decorative assets

Variant instruction:
Create the strongest single version; do not make a collage or compare alternatives inside the image.

Negative constraints:
none

Final response contract: reply only {"generated": true}.

Quality gates to satisfy visually:
- 必须能看出这是连续 deck 的一页。
- 必须包含标题、核心结论/说明、结构化内容区。
- 不要编造公司名、真实客户案例、市场规模、年份、benchmark 或未给定数字。
- single coherent slide, not a collage of unrelated panels
- use the full 16:9 canvas with balanced density; avoid large accidental empty regions
- presentation polish should be comparable to a manually designed high-impact academic overview slide
- contains enough readable explanatory text to be useful as a PPT slide: title, takeaway, section labels, and concise body copy
- must not look like a layout-only wireframe or unlabeled component scaffold
- clear focal hierarchy with generous margins and no overcrowding
- high contrast between foreground and background
- no overlapping text or visual elements
- no cropped important content near slide edges
- no unreadable microtext, mojibake, pseudo-letters, or random captions
- data-like visuals must be source-grounded or deliberately abstract
- when verified metrics are unavailable, use unlabeled abstract mini-charts or schematic indicators rather than fake numbers
- professional typography and spacing suitable for a 16:9 presentation

Visual richness guidance:
- do not reduce the slide to five plain cards; add source-safe visual substance inside and around the pipeline
- synthetic thumbnails are allowed when they are clearly generic: microscopy-like panels, figure crops, mask overlays, charts, asset swatches, vector nodes, and editable-canvas previews
- unlabeled charts may show abstract trends, bars, or scatter patterns for visual metaphor only; do not add axis labels, numeric values, legends with unsupported method names, or performance claims
- avoid domain-specific imagery such as biomedical cells, molecules, organs, maps, hardware, company products, or clinical scenes unless provided by the source context
- for generic AI/pipeline topics, use neutral paper-figure thumbnails, document crops, layout grids, chart placeholders, mask overlays, UI-free vector diagrams, and editable-canvas previews
- show process transformation visually: raw figure -> detected text/regions -> separated assets -> native shapes -> editable slide output
- use varied panel scale, subtle shadows, thin rules, and accent color blocks to create depth and a finished editorial look
- include enough small visual detail to feel premium, while keeping semantic modules cleanly separable for DrawAI
- if a subtitle is useful, derive it only from the primary request and avoid unsupported claims

Composition guidance:
- 这是一组模板图库横向测试，每张图都必须是完整 PPT 页面，不是海报或纯插画。
- 同一模板的 4 页需要有明显连续 deck 一致性：标题系统、色彩、模块风格、图标/线条语言一致。
- 只根据本页 page_brief 改变页面类型；不要改变总主题。
- 文字应跟随用户输入语言和 visible_text_blocks，不要生成随机英文栏目或伪文字。
- compose like a finished slide, not a sparse wireframe or UI mockup
- use a rich overview structure when appropriate: title plus subtitle, left input bookend, central pipeline, right output bookend, and compact bottom overview band
- for academic or technical topics, prefer a left-to-right pipeline, method/results overview, or evidence hierarchy
- use abstract, source-safe visual evidence when exact datasets are unavailable: synthetic figure thumbnails, module cards, flow arrows, masks, crop examples, schematic charts without numeric labels
- maintain Swiss/editorial discipline: aligned columns, consistent spacing, restrained color accents, and clear typographic scale
- keep every visible label purposeful; do not add decorative pseudo-text to fill space
- make the result feel publication/presentation ready at first glance while preserving factual restraint

DrawAI post-processing constraints:
- 文本区域保持高对比，方便 OCR 识别。
- 模块边界清晰，方便 SAM/DrawAI 后续可编辑重建。
- 避免将语义文字压在复杂纹理、强噪声或低对比渐变上。
- use crisp object boundaries and clean layer separation where possible
- keep text regions high contrast and OCR-friendly if text appears
- avoid textured noise directly behind text or chart labels
- avoid excessive glow, blur, transparency, and low-contrast gradients over semantic content
- prefer simple geometric regions for tables, charts, cards, arrows, and panels
- leave enough spacing for DrawAI to segment text, icons, charts, and decorative assets

Variant instruction:
Create the strongest single version; do not make a collage or compare alternatives inside the image.

Negative constraints:
none

Final response contract: reply only {"generated": true}.

2048x1152 high-quality opaque PNG, premium PPT slide bitmap, 16:9. Swiss Grid template visual system: strict asymmetric editorial grid, disciplined whitespace, white/black base with one strong red accent and one muted blue accent, precise modern sans-serif Chinese typography, strong scale contrast, aligned labels, thin rules, modular rhythm, crisp boundaries for downstream segmentation. Finished presentation slide, not a wireframe.

Topic/page: 第 1/4 页：接入总览 for deck “AI Agent 工作流如何接入企业文档体系”. Audience: 企业管理层、知识管理团队、AI 产品与技术团队.

Render all text directly in the bitmap, OCR-readable, Chinese dominant. Required visible text exactly readable:
Title: “AI Agent 工作流如何接入企业文档体系”
Takeaway/subtitle: “不是把文档丢给模型，而是把知识源、权限、检索和评估接成可控闭环。”
Core module labels: “文档接入”, “知识治理”, “权限边界”, “Agent 编排”, “持续评估”.

Composition: full slide with generous margins. Top left large title; small page marker “01 / 04 接入总览” aligned top right. Under title a strong takeaway line in black on white with a thin red rule. Main content: left-to-right high-level pipeline from enterprise document sources to knowledge index to Agent workflow to governance feedback loop. Use five aligned modules on a Swiss grid, not five plain cards: each module has a clean icon-like geometric visual and 1-2 concise Chinese bullets. Add thin connector arrows and a red accent feedback loop returning from 持续评估 to 知识治理 / 权限边界.

Suggested body copy, source-grounded only, readable and concise:
文档接入: “汇聚制度、流程、项目资料等知识源”
知识治理: “清洗、切分、标注与版本管理”
权限边界: “按角色与场景控制可见范围”
Agent 编排: “结合检索增强与任务步骤执行”
持续评估: “人工复核、风险拦截、效果回看”
Add small note near bottom: “数值为测试样例数据，不代表真实业务结果。”

Include a compact bottom overview band with four small metric tiles using only supplied synthetic test metrics, clearly labeled as sample/test metrics: “文档覆盖率 72%”, “检索命中率 81%”, “人工复核通过率 88%”, “高风险回答拦截率 96%”. Use simple mini bars/rings, no unsupported axes or benchmarks. Add a tiny caption: “Synthetic test metrics / 模板图库样例”.

Visual richness: use generic document thumbnails, index node grid, lock boundary, agent workflow blocks, evaluation loop dashboard indicators. No company logos, no real UI brands, no invented dates, citations, market size, customer cases, maps, or benchmarks. Avoid random English headings, pseudo-writing, mojibake, tiny illegible text. Text must sit on clean solid high-contrast regions. Crisp vector-like shapes, subtle shadows, thin rules, restrained accent blocks. Balanced density, high-impact academic/strategy overview slide, single coherent slide, no collage, no cropped edges, no overlapping elements.

Required labels exactly readable in Chinese: “意图识别”, “检索增强”, “工具调用”, “答案生成”, “引用回溯”, “人工反馈”. Include “用户问题” at the start. Use RAG wording inside retrieval module as secondary label: “RAG 检索”.

Each module is a clean rectangular card with thin black rules, white fill, crisp boundary, subtle shadow, consistent spacing, and small abstract icon/diagram detail. Module body copy should be concise and source-grounded only:
- 意图识别: “识别任务、权限边界与所需上下文”
- 检索增强: “从企业文档体系召回相关片段”
- 工具调用: “按工作流编排调用检索、审批或业务工具”
- 答案生成: “基于上下文合成可解释回答”
- 引用回溯: “保留来源片段，支持回看与核验”
- 人工反馈: “复核结果进入持续评估闭环”

Right bookend output module: “可追溯回答” with generic answer panel and citation chips, no fake citations or company names. Show arrows from 引用回溯 to output and feedback loop from 人工反馈 back to 意图识别 / 检索增强. The workflow must clearly show the user question passing through intent recognition, RAG retrieval, tool invocation, answer generation, citation traceback and feedback.

Bottom band: compact governance strip titled “接入企业文档体系的控制点” with four aligned items, no unsupported numbers: “文档接入”, “知识治理”, “权限边界”, “持续评估”. Add a small source-safe note in bottom-right: “注：数值与指标仅为测试样例，不代表真实业务结果。” Do not show any metrics unless using supplied test values; better omit metrics or keep abstract unlabeled micro-bars.

Visual richness: use modular grid lines, thin rules, accent blocks, abstract document thumbnails, node-link mini diagrams, small generic chart placeholders without labels or numeric axes, state memory line as blue horizontal bus. High contrast text on clean backgrounds. No logos, no named entities, no dates, no market claims, no fake benchmarks, no random English headings. Single coherent slide, not collage. Balanced density, generous margins, no overlapping elements, no cropped content, no decorative blobs, no complex texture behind text. Finished professional slide comparable to manually designed executive technical overview.

- single coherent slide, not a collage of unrelated panels
- use the full 16:9 canvas with balanced density; avoid large accidental empty regions
