- contains enough readable explanatory text to be useful as a PPT slide: title, takeaway, section labels, and concise body copy
- must not look like a layout-only wireframe or unlabeled component scaffold
- clear focal hierarchy with generous margins and no overcrowding
- high contrast between foreground and background
- no overlapping text or visual elements
- no cropped important content near slide edges
- no unreadable microtext, mojibake, pseudo-letters, or random captions
- data-like visuals must be source-grounded or deliberately abstract
- when verified metrics are unavailable, use unlabeled abstract mini-charts or schematic indicators rather than fake numbers
- professional typography and spacing suitable for a 16:9 presentation

Visual richness guidance:
- do not reduce the slide to five plain cards; add source-safe visual substance inside and around the pipeline

- unlabeled charts may show abstract trends, bars, or scatter patterns for visual metaphor only; do not add axis labels, numeric values, legends with unsupported method names, or performance claims
- avoid domain-specific imagery such as biomedical cells, molecules, organs, maps, hardware, company products, or clinical scenes unless provided by the source context
- for generic AI/pipeline topics, use neutral paper-figure thumbnails, document crops, layout grids, chart placeholders, mask overlays, UI-free vector diagrams, and editable-canvas previews
- show process transformation visually: raw figure -> detected text/regions -> separated assets -> native shapes -> editable slide output
- use varied panel scale, subtle shadows, thin rules, and accent color blocks to create depth and a finished editorial look
- include enough small visual detail to feel premium, while keeping semantic modules cleanly separable for DrawAI
- if a subtitle is useful, derive it only from the primary request and avoid unsupported claims

Composition guidance:
- 这是一组模板图库横向测试，每张图都必须是完整 PPT 页面，不是海报或纯插画。
- 同一模板的 4 页需要有明显连续 deck 一致性：标题系统、色彩、模块风格、图标/线条语言一致。
- 只根据本页 page_brief 改变页面类型；不要改变总主题。
- 文字应跟随用户输入语言和 visible_text_blocks，不要生成随机英文栏目或伪文字。
- compose like a finished slide, not a sparse wireframe or UI mockup
- use a rich overview structure when appropriate: title plus subtitle, left input bookend, central pipeline, right output bookend, and compact bottom overview band
- for academic or technical topics, prefer a left-to-right pipeline, method/results overview, or evidence hierarchy
- use abstract, source-safe visual evidence when exact datasets are unavailable: synthetic figure thumbnails, module cards, flow arrows, masks, crop examples, schematic charts without numeric labels
- maintain Swiss/editorial discipline: aligned columns, consistent spacing, restrained color accents, and clear typographic scale
- keep every visible label purposeful; do not add decorative pseudo-text to fill space
- make the result feel publication/presentation ready at first glance while preserving factual restraint

DrawAI post-processing constraints:
- 文本区域保持高对比，方便 OCR 识别。
- 模块边界清晰，方便 SAM/DrawAI 后续可编辑重建。
- 避免将语义文字压在复杂纹理、强噪声或低对比渐变上。
- use crisp object boundaries and clean layer separation where possible
- keep text regions high contrast and OCR-friendly if text appears
- avoid textured noise directly behind text or chart labels
- avoid excessive glow, blur, transparency, and low-contrast gradients over semantic content
- prefer simple geometric regions for tables, charts, cards, arrows, and panels
- leave enough spacing for DrawAI to segment text, icons, charts, and decorative assets

Variant instruction:
Create the strongest single version; do not make a collage or compare alternatives inside the image.

Negative constraints:
none

Final response contract: reply only {"generated": true}.

images.revised_prompt:
2048x1152 high-quality opaque PNG, premium slide-ready bitmap for a Chinese PPT deck, Swiss Grid template visual system. Create page 4/4 of a deck titled about “AI Agent 工作流如何接入企业文档体系”. Slide title in large precise Chinese sans-serif: “治理与上线闭环”. Subtitle/takeaway beneath: “上线后要持续监控来源可信、权限越界、风险回答和失败样例。”

Design: strict Swiss grid, white/black base with one strong accent color such as cobalt blue and one small safety accent red/orange. Asymmetric editorial layout, disciplined margins, visible grid alignment, thin black rules, modular rhythm, purposeful typography, high contrast, no gradients or decorative blobs. Medium-high text density, finished PPT explanation page, not wireframe.

Composition: left third has large title block and concise context bullets. Center/right two-thirds shows a governance closed-loop diagram combining a horizontal route map and circular feedback loop. Six clearly separated modules with readable Chinese headers: “来源可信”, “权限控制”, “风险拦截”, “效果评估”, “灰度上线”, “反馈复盘”. Each module has a crisp icon-like geometric mark and 1 short Chinese explanatory line, source-grounded only:
- 来源可信：校验文档来源与版本状态
- 权限控制：按角色与场景设置访问边界
- 风险拦截：拦截高风险回答与越界请求
- 效果评估：持续评估检索与复核结果
- 灰度上线：小范围验证后逐步放量
- 反馈复盘：沉淀失败样例并更新规则

Add a compact bottom band labeled “上线闭环检查项” with a clean control matrix: rows or columns for the same six governance items, showing abstract check marks/status dots only, no invented dates, companies, benchmarks, or unsupported numbers. Optionally include the provided synthetic test metrics in a small source-safe panel, clearly labeled “测试样例指标（非真实业务结果）”, with only these values: 文档覆盖率 72%, 检索命中率 81%, 人工复核通过率 88%, 高风险回答拦截率 96%. Keep this panel compact and obviously secondary.

Include footer marker “04 / 04” and small deck topic text “AI Agent × 企业文档体系” without logos. All visible text must be Chinese-dominant, clean, OCR-readable, no pseudo-writing, no random English headings, no mojibake. Use crisp module boundaries for downstream segmentation, no overlapping text, no cropped content, no tiny unreadable captions. Full 16:9 canvas, balanced density, presentation-polished, single coherent slide, not a collage.

- text_density: medium
- main_language: Chinese. Use Chinese for the main title, subtitle, section headers, bullets, callouts, captions, warnings, and takeaway text.
- Keep English only for model/product/API names, acronyms, code identifiers, benchmark names, and standard technical terms where Chinese translation would be unnatural.
- Do not render generic English section headings. Use Chinese headings such as 核心结论、来源质量、威胁模型、记忆分层、状态表示、技术栈、风险边界.

- Do not translate Chinese headings, bullets, or speaker-facing explanations into English unless the user explicitly requests English.
- Required visible text is a floor, not a ceiling: do not reduce the slide to labels and layout only.
- Minimum useful text: a clear title, subtitle or takeaway when supplied, readable section/module labels, and 3-6 concise explanatory bullets or callouts.
- For medium-density technical PPT pages, use normal slide copy density: enough text to explain the idea at a glance while preserving spacing.
- Body copy may paraphrase only the primary request, supplied claims, visible_text_blocks, and source-grounded context.
- Avoid tiny text, gibberish, pseudo-writing, watermark-like marks, signatures, random labels, and unreadable micro-captions.
- If exact long text rendering is risky, split it into shorter readable bullets or callouts; never leave the slide textless.

Quality gates to satisfy visually:
- 必须能看出这是连续 deck 的一页。
- 必须包含标题、核心结论/说明、结构化内容区。
- 不要编造公司名、真实客户案例、市场规模、年份、benchmark 或未给定数字。
- single coherent slide, not a collage of unrelated panels
- use the full 16:9 canvas with balanced density; avoid large accidental empty regions
- presentation polish should be comparable to a manually designed high-impact academic overview slide
- contains enough readable explanatory text to be useful as a PPT slide: title, takeaway, section labels, and concise body copy
- must not look like a layout-only wireframe or unlabeled component scaffold
- clear focal hierarchy with generous margins and no overcrowding
- high contrast between foreground and background
- no overlapping text or visual elements
- no cropped important content near slide edges
- no unreadable microtext, mojibake, pseudo-letters, or random captions
- data-like visuals must be source-grounded or deliberately abstract
- when verified metrics are unavailable, use unlabeled abstract mini-charts or schematic indicators rather than fake numbers
- professional typography and spacing suitable for a 16:9 presentation

Visual richness guidance:
- do not reduce the slide to five plain cards; add source-safe visual substance inside and around the pipeline
- synthetic thumbnails are allowed when they are clearly generic: microscopy-like panels, figure crops, mask overlays, charts, asset swatches, vector nodes, and editable-canvas previews
- unlabeled charts may show abstract trends, bars, or scatter patterns for visual metaphor only; do not add axis labels, numeric values, legends with unsupported method names, or performance claims
- avoid domain-specific imagery such as biomedical cells, molecules, organs, maps, hardware, company products, or clinical scenes unless provided by the source context
- for generic AI/pipeline topics, use neutral paper-figure thumbnails, document crops, layout grids, chart placeholders, mask overlays, UI-free vector diagrams, and editable-canvas previews
- show process transformation visually: raw figure -> detected text/regions -> separated assets -> native shapes -> editable slide output
- use varied panel scale, subtle shadows, thin rules, and accent color blocks to create depth and a finished editorial look
- include enough small visual detail to feel premium, while keeping semantic modules cleanly separable for DrawAI
- if a subtitle is useful, derive it only from the primary request and avoid unsupported claims

Composition guidance:
- 这是一组模板图库横向测试，每张图都必须是完整 PPT 页面，不是海报或纯插画。
- 同一模板的 4 页需要有明显连续 deck 一致性：标题系统、色彩、模块风格、图标/线条语言一致。
- 只根据本页 page_brief 改变页面类型；不要改变总主题。
- 文字应跟随用户输入语言和 visible_text_blocks，不要生成随机英文栏目或伪文字。
- compose like a finished slide, not a sparse wireframe or UI mockup
- use a rich overview structure when appropriate: title plus subtitle, left input bookend, central pipeline, right output bookend, and compact bottom overview band
- for academic or technical topics, prefer a left-to-right pipeline, method/results overview, or evidence hierarchy
- use abstract, source-safe visual evidence when exact datasets are unavailable: synthetic figure thumbnails, module cards, flow arrows, masks, crop examples, schematic charts without numeric labels
- maintain Swiss/editorial discipline: aligned columns, consistent spacing, restrained color accents, and clear typographic scale
- keep every visible label purposeful; do not add decorative pseudo-text to fill space
- make the result feel publication/presentation ready at first glance while preserving factual restraint

DrawAI post-processing constraints:
- 文本区域保持高对比，方便 OCR 识别。
- 模块边界清晰，方便 SAM/DrawAI 后续可编辑重建。
- 避免将语义文字压在复杂纹理、强噪声或低对比渐变上。
- use crisp object boundaries and clean layer separation where possible
- keep text regions high contrast and OCR-friendly if text appears
- avoid textured noise directly behind text or chart labels
- avoid excessive glow, blur, transparency, and low-contrast gradients over semantic content
- prefer simple geometric regions for tables, charts, cards, arrows, and panels
- leave enough spacing for DrawAI to segment text, icons, charts, and decorative assets

Variant instruction:
Create the strongest single version; do not make a collage or compare alternatives inside the image.

Negative constraints:
none

Final response contract: reply only {"generated": true}.

images.revised_prompt:
2048x1152 high-quality opaque PNG, premium 16:9 PPT slide, modern bento_grid visual system for a technical enterprise AI deck, slide 1/4 overview. Chinese-first baked text, all text crisp and readable, no pseudo text.

Topic/title visible exactly in Chinese: “AI Agent 工作流如何接入企业文档体系”. Subtitle/takeaway visible: “不是把文档丢给模型，而是把知识源、权限、检索和评估接成可控闭环。”

Design: neutral light background (#F7F8FA), varied subtle panel fills, one vivid teal/cyan accent, restrained charcoal text, thin rules, small soft shadows, 8px rounded bento tiles. Swiss editorial spacing, generous margins, high contrast, clean segmentation boundaries. Must look like a complete PPT page in a continuous deck, not a poster or wireframe.

Layout: top header band with small page marker “01 / 接入总览” and the title/subtitle. Main area is a varied bento grid with a large central hero panel containing a left-to-right enterprise document-to-Agent pipeline. Use clear labeled stages and arrows:
1 文档接入
2 知识治理
3 权限边界
4 知识索引 / 检索增强
5 Agent 编排
6 持续评估

Hero panel visual: left bookend “文档源” with generic document thumbnails, folder icons, knowledge base sheets; middle transformation layers with clean vector nodes, lock shield, index stack, retrieval arrow; right bookend “Agent 工作流” with abstract workflow nodes and task cards; loop arrow returning from “持续评估” back to “知识治理” to show governance closed loop. Add concise Chinese callouts inside hero panel only from supplied context: “从文档源到知识索引”, “检索增强进入工作流”, “评估反馈治理策略”.

Supporting bento tiles around/below hero, varied sizes, non-empty:
- Tile heading “文档接入”: body “汇聚制度、知识库、项目资料等企业文档源。”
- Tile heading “知识治理”: body “清洗、切分、标注与版本管理，形成可检索知识资产。”
- Tile heading “权限边界”: body “按用户、角色与场景控制可访问范围。”
- Tile heading “Agent 编排”: body “把检索结果接入任务步骤、工具调用与人工确认。”
- Tile heading “持续评估”: body “监控回答质量与高风险输出，形成治理闭环。”

Metrics strip as source-grounded synthetic sample, clearly labeled “测试样例指标，非真实业务结果”: four compact metric chips with supplied values only: “文档覆盖率 72%”, “检索命中率 81%”, “人工复核通过率 88%”, “高风险回答拦截率 96%”. Use small progress rings/bars but no extra unsupported numbers.

Visual richness: include generic source-safe thumbnails, abstract document crops, vector icons for document stack, shield/lock, index database, workflow nodes, evaluation check. No company logos, no customer names, no dates, no market claims, no citations, no fake UI products. Avoid domain-specific imagery. Keep text on simple solid/light panels, no complex texture behind text. Clear focal hierarchy, balanced density, no overlapping, no cropped content, no unreadable microtext, no random English headings.

generation.prompt:
DrawAI high-quality PPT slide image request.

Goal:
- Produce one premium slide-ready bitmap image for a PPT workflow.
- The image may be non-editable; it will later pass through DrawAI's editable reconstruction pipeline.
- Optimize for visual quality, factual restraint, clear structure, OCR-readability, and downstream segmentation.
- Default rendering mode is baked_text: render complete title, body copy, diagrams, charts, and visual structure directly inside the final bitmap.
- Do not trade away presentation beauty for caution: keep the slide visually memorable, premium, and finished while staying source-grounded.

Mandatory tool behavior:
- Use the built-in Codex image generation tool for exactly one output image.
- Do not call OpenAI Images API manually.
- Do not use shell commands, web search, MCP tools, or multi-agent delegation in this image-generation turn.

Primary request:
用户输入：生成《AI Agent 工作流如何接入企业文档体系》的PPT
请生成第 2/4 页：文档接入流程。
流程页：展示文档采集、清洗分块、元数据标注、向量索引、权限绑定和质量检查。可以使用横向流程、泳道图、节点链路或模板适配的等价结构。

- size: 2048x1152
- quality: high
- background: opaque
- output_format: png

- mode: image_first_ppt_slide
- type: process

- style: 使用模板 bento_grid 的视觉系统。该模板用途：feature overviews, product capability decks, summary dashboards, AI system maps。视觉方向：template-specific slide design。本页是连续 deck 的第 2/4 页，必须与同模板其他页面保持色彩、字体层级、图形语言和边距一致。
- template_id: bento_grid
- design_principles: ["finished PPT explanation page, not a bare layout scaffold", "balanced narrative text and visuals", "source-grounded factual content", "clear hierarchy with readable body copy", "high visual ambition with a polished first-glance impact"]

Template effect card:
- none: use the selected strategy template only.

Reference execution mode:
- reference_mode: auto

Main title top left: “Agent 工作流架构”. Under it as subtitle/takeaway in clear Chinese: “Agent 需要在意图识别、检索增强、工具调用和引用回溯之间保持状态。” Add small page marker top right: “03 / 04”.

Composition: use full canvas with a large central hero bento panel showing a clear left-to-right workflow pipeline. It must visibly show user question flowing through stages:
1 用户问题
2 意图识别
3 检索增强
4 工具调用
5 答案生成
6 引用回溯
7 人工反馈
Use connected nodes/cards with arrows, a continuous state line or memory ribbon above/below connecting modules, and feedback loop arrow from 人工反馈 back to 意图识别 / 检索增强. Use concise Chinese microcopy inside/near modules, readable, no pseudo text.

Central module details, concise Chinese labels only:
- 用户问题: “业务问题 / 文档范围”
- 意图识别: “识别任务、权限、上下文”
- 检索增强: “RAG 检索企业文档片段”
- 工具调用: “流程、系统、知识工具”
- 答案生成: “整合证据并生成回复”
- 引用回溯: “定位原文与依据”
- 人工反馈: “复核、纠偏、持续评估”

Supporting bento tiles around hero panel:
Left vertical tile: “接入边界” with bullets: “文档接入”, “知识治理”, “权限边界”. Include clean generic document stack icon and lock icon, no logos.
Right vertical tile: “输出约束” with bullets: “回答必须带依据”, “高风险问题进入复核”, “反馈回写评估”. Include generic citation link icon and shield icon.
Bottom horizontal band: “流程编排要点” with three compact chips: “保持状态”, “权限校验”, “引用可追溯”. Add note in small but readable text: “数值与指标仅为测试样例；本页不展示真实业务结果。”
Optional small abstract mini indicators are allowed but no invented numbers except this note; do not show charts with values.

Visual language: bento grid with varied panel sizes, not equal cards; clear hero tile plus supporting tiles. Crisp vector-like diagrams, clean geometric boundaries, high contrast text on plain panels, no complex texture behind text. Premium editorial design, balanced density, strong hierarchy, no overlapping, no cropped edges, no random English headings, no company names/logos/citations/dates/benchmarks. Chinese text must be readable and meaningful, avoid mojibake/pseudo-writing. Use icons and schematic document thumbnails only as generic source-safe visuals.

- 不要编造公司名、真实客户案例、市场规模、年份、benchmark 或未给定数字。

- use the full 16:9 canvas with balanced density; avoid large accidental empty regions

- clear focal hierarchy with generous margins and no overcrowding

- no overlapping text or visual elements
- no cropped important content near slide edges
- no unreadable microtext, mojibake, pseudo-letters, or random captions
- data-like visuals must be source-grounded or deliberately abstract
- when verified metrics are unavailable, use unlabeled abstract mini-charts or schematic indicators rather than fake numbers

Visual richness guidance:
- do not reduce the slide to five plain cards; add source-safe visual substance inside and around the pipeline

- for generic AI/pipeline topics, use neutral paper-figure thumbnails, document crops, layout grids, chart placeholders, mask overlays, UI-free vector diagrams, and editable-canvas previews
- show process transformation visually: raw figure -> detected text/regions -> separated assets -> native shapes -> editable slide output
- use varied panel scale, subtle shadows, thin rules, and accent color blocks to create depth and a finished editorial look
- include enough small visual detail to feel premium, while keeping semantic modules cleanly separable for DrawAI
- if a subtitle is useful, derive it only from the primary request and avoid unsupported claims

Composition guidance:
- 这是一组模板图库横向测试，每张图都必须是完整 PPT 页面，不是海报或纯插画。
- 同一模板的 4 页需要有明显连续 deck 一致性：标题系统、色彩、模块风格、图标/线条语言一致。
- 只根据本页 page_brief 改变页面类型；不要改变总主题。
- 文字应跟随用户输入语言和 visible_text_blocks，不要生成随机英文栏目或伪文字。
- compose like a finished slide, not a sparse wireframe or UI mockup
- use a rich overview structure when appropriate: title plus subtitle, left input bookend, central pipeline, right output bookend, and compact bottom overview band
- for academic or technical topics, prefer a left-to-right pipeline, method/results overview, or evidence hierarchy
- use abstract, source-safe visual evidence when exact datasets are unavailable: synthetic figure thumbnails, module cards, flow arrows, masks, crop examples, schematic charts without numeric labels
- maintain Swiss/editorial discipline: aligned columns, consistent spacing, restrained color accents, and clear typographic scale
- keep every visible label purposeful; do not add decorative pseudo-text to fill space
- make the result feel publication/presentation ready at first glance while preserving factual restraint

DrawAI post-processing constraints:
- 文本区域保持高对比，方便 OCR 识别。
- 模块边界清晰，方便 SAM/DrawAI 后续可编辑重建。

- use crisp object boundaries and clean layer separation where possible
- keep text regions high contrast and OCR-friendly if text appears
- avoid textured noise directly behind text or chart labels
- avoid excessive glow, blur, transparency, and low-contrast gradients over semantic content
- prefer simple geometric regions for tables, charts, cards, arrows, and panels
- leave enough spacing for DrawAI to segment text, icons, charts, and decorative assets

Create the strongest single version; do not make a collage or compare alternatives inside the image.

Negative constraints:
none

Inside the center, a compact label: “上线闭环”. Add short readable callouts near nodes, paraphrased only from source: 来源可信：文档来源与版本可追溯；权限控制：按权限边界检索与回答；风险拦截：拦截高风险回答；效果评估：持续评估检索与工作流表现；灰度上线：小范围发布后扩大；反馈复盘：沉淀失败样例与改进项.

Supporting bento tiles around hero tile with varied sizes, not equal cards:

3) “上线检查” tile: concise checklist bullets: 权限策略已绑定；来源标签已保留；风险规则已启用；失败样例可回流.
4) “持续评估” tile: abstract, unlabeled mini trend and document thumbnails, with body copy: “围绕检索增强、工作流编排和持续评估形成闭环。”

Visual richness: include generic document snippets, shield/lock/check icons, flow arrows, small abstract charts, layered document cards, no pseudo-writing except purposeful readable labels above. Keep all semantic text high contrast on plain panels, OCR-friendly, no text over noisy backgrounds, no overlaps, no cropped edges. Make it look like a coherent slide from a continuous deck, premium editorial dashboard/governance page, balanced density, polished first glance.

Visible text and body-copy policy:
- Render a normal PPT explanation page: include required visible content, then add concise source-grounded body copy from the primary request, claims, and visible_text_blocks. Text must be readable, useful, and large enough for a slide thumbnail. Preserve the user's language unless the user explicitly asks for another language.
- text_density: medium
- main_language: Chinese. Use Chinese for the main title, subtitle, section headers, bullets, callouts, captions, warnings, and takeaway text.
- Keep English only for model/product/API names, acronyms, code identifiers, benchmark names, and standard technical terms where Chinese translation would be unnatural.
- Do not render generic English section headings. Use Chinese headings such as 核心结论、来源质量、威胁模型、记忆分层、状态表示、技术栈、风险边界.
- If REQUIRED_VISIBLE_TEXT contains English generic descriptors, treat them as semantic hints and render concise Chinese equivalents unless they also appear in EXACT_TEXT_DO_NOT_TRANSLATE.
- A mixed Chinese/English technical slide is acceptable only when the Chinese text remains dominant and explanatory.
- Match the language of the primary request and supplied visible text. If the request is Chinese, render Chinese slide copy; preserve model names, APIs, metrics, and technical terms in English only where they are proper nouns or standard terms.
- Do not translate Chinese headings, bullets, or speaker-facing explanations into English unless the user explicitly requests English.
- Required visible text is a floor, not a ceiling: do not reduce the slide to labels and layout only.
- Minimum useful text: a clear title, subtitle or takeaway when supplied, readable section/module labels, and 3-6 concise explanatory bullets or callouts.
- For medium-density technical PPT pages, use normal slide copy density: enough text to explain the idea at a glance while preserving spacing.
- Body copy may paraphrase only the primary request, supplied claims, visible_text_blocks, and source-grounded context.
- Avoid tiny text, gibberish, pseudo-writing, watermark-like marks, signatures, random labels, and unreadable micro-captions.
- If exact long text rendering is risky, split it into shorter readable bullets or callouts; never leave the slide textless.

Quality gates to satisfy visually:
- 必须能看出这是连续 deck 的一页。
- 必须包含标题、核心结论/说明、结构化内容区。
- 不要编造公司名、真实客户案例、市场规模、年份、benchmark 或未给定数字。
- single coherent slide, not a collage of unrelated panels
- use the full 16:9 canvas with balanced density; avoid large accidental empty regions
- presentation polish should be comparable to a manually designed high-impact academic overview slide
- contains enough readable explanatory text to be useful as a PPT slide: title, takeaway, section labels, and concise body copy
- must not look like a layout-only wireframe or unlabeled component scaffold
- clear focal hierarchy with generous margins and no overcrowding
- high contrast between foreground and background
- no overlapping text or visual elements
- no cropped important content near slide edges
- no unreadable microtext, mojibake, pseudo-letters, or random captions
- data-like visuals must be source-grounded or deliberately abstract
- when verified metrics are unavailable, use unlabeled abstract mini-charts or schematic indicators rather than fake numbers
- professional typography and spacing suitable for a 16:9 presentation

Visual richness guidance:
- do not reduce the slide to five plain cards; add source-safe visual substance inside and around the pipeline
- synthetic thumbnails are allowed when they are clearly generic: microscopy-like panels, figure crops, mask overlays, charts, asset swatches, vector nodes, and editable-canvas previews
- unlabeled charts may show abstract trends, bars, or scatter patterns for visual metaphor only; do not add axis labels, numeric values, legends with unsupported method names, or performance claims
- avoid domain-specific imagery such as biomedical cells, molecules, organs, maps, hardware, company products, or clinical scenes unless provided by the source context
- for generic AI/pipeline topics, use neutral paper-figure thumbnails, document crops, layout grids, chart placeholders, mask overlays, UI-free vector diagrams, and editable-canvas previews
- show process transformation visually: raw figure -> detected text/regions -> separated assets -> native shapes -> editable slide output
- use varied panel scale, subtle shadows, thin rules, and accent color blocks to create depth and a finished editorial look
- include enough small visual detail to feel premium, while keeping semantic modules cleanly separable for DrawAI
- if a subtitle is useful, derive it only from the primary request and avoid unsupported claims

Composition guidance:
- 这是一组模板图库横向测试，每张图都必须是完整 PPT 页面，不是海报或纯插画。
- 同一模板的 4 页需要有明显连续 deck 一致性：标题系统、色彩、模块风格、图标/线条语言一致。
- 只根据本页 page_brief 改变页面类型；不要改变总主题。
- 文字应跟随用户输入语言和 visible_text_blocks，不要生成随机英文栏目或伪文字。
- compose like a finished slide, not a sparse wireframe or UI mockup
- use a rich overview structure when appropriate: title plus subtitle, left input bookend, central pipeline, right output bookend, and compact bottom overview band
- for academic or technical topics, prefer a left-to-right pipeline, method/results overview, or evidence hierarchy
- use abstract, source-safe visual evidence when exact datasets are unavailable: synthetic figure thumbnails, module cards, flow arrows, masks, crop examples, schematic charts without numeric labels
- maintain Swiss/editorial discipline: aligned columns, consistent spacing, restrained color accents, and clear typographic scale
- keep every visible label purposeful; do not add decorative pseudo-text to fill space
- make the result feel publication/presentation ready at first glance while preserving factual restraint

DrawAI post-processing constraints:
- 文本区域保持高对比，方便 OCR 识别。
- 模块边界清晰，方便 SAM/DrawAI 后续可编辑重建。
- 避免将语义文字压在复杂纹理、强噪声或低对比渐变上。
- use crisp object boundaries and clean layer separation where possible
- keep text regions high contrast and OCR-friendly if text appears
- avoid textured noise directly behind text or chart labels
- avoid excessive glow, blur, transparency, and low-contrast gradients over semantic content
- prefer simple geometric regions for tables, charts, cards, arrows, and panels
- leave enough spacing for DrawAI to segment text, icons, charts, and decorative assets

Variant instruction:
Create the strongest single version; do not make a collage or compare alternatives inside the image.

Negative constraints:
none

Final response contract: reply only {"generated": true}.

images.revised_prompt:
Create one 2048x1152 high-quality opaque PNG slide-ready bitmap, 16:9, in the Blue Robot Learning visual system: blue-white rounded educational robot mood, clean cartoon outlines, soft red/yellow accents, friendly original blue-white robot tutor, future small gadgets, Japanese children's manga panel rhythm, but still polished for enterprise management and technical teams. Render as a complete PPT overview slide with baked readable Chinese text.

Topic/page: 第 1/4 页，接入总览，for deck titled “AI Agent 工作流如何接入企业文档体系”. Show the overall logic from enterprise document sources to knowledge index, Agent workflow, and governance loop.

Main layout: finished PPT explanation page, not a poster. Generous margins. Top title band with small page marker “01 / 接入总览”. Large Chinese title: “AI Agent 工作流如何接入企业文档体系”. Subtitle/takeaway directly below in a high-contrast rounded speech bubble or ribbon: “不是把文档丢给模型，而是把知识源、权限、检索和评估接成可控闭环。”

Central visual: a clear left-to-right pipeline with five rounded modules, separated for segmentation, connected by thick playful blue arrows and subtle dotted return loop. Use concise readable Chinese labels and short body copy only from supplied facts.
1) “文档接入” with generic document-source icons: 文件、知识库、表格、FAQ; body: “汇聚企业文档源”
2) “知识治理” with tidy index/database and tag icons; body: “清洗、分块、索引”
3) “权限边界” with shield/key icon; body: “按角色控制可见范围”
4) “Agent 编排” with robot-orchestration/workflow nodes; body: “检索增强 + 工具调用”
5) “持续评估” with checklist/loop icon; body: “人工复核与风险拦截”
Make the loop visually close back from 持续评估 to 知识治理 with label “治理闭环”. Include “检索增强” as a small bridge label between 知识治理 and Agent 编排.

Character and visual richness: Place a friendly original rounded blue-white robot tutor near the lower left or side, pointing at the pipeline with a small pointer wand or tablet. The robot must be original and not resemble protected characters. Add small clean future gadgets, document sheets, nodes, and simple abstract mini charts without unsupported numbers. Use source-safe abstract thumbnails only, no company logos, no real products, no dates, no market claims.

Bottom band: compact “关键环节” overview strip with 5 icon chips labeled exactly: “文档接入”, “知识治理”, “权限边界”, “Agent 编排”, “持续评估”. Also include a small note in Chinese: “测试样例数据仅用于模板展示，不代表真实业务结果。” If adding metric chips, only use supplied synthetic test metrics and mark them as sample: “文档覆盖率 72%”, “检索命中率 81%”, “人工复核通过率 88%”, “高风险回答拦截率 96%”, but keep them secondary and clearly labeled “样例指标”. Do not invent any other numbers.

Style details: blue-white base background with subtle classroom/future grid, clean high-contrast white cards, rounded 8-14px card feeling, crisp module boundaries, thin navy outlines, soft yellow and red accents sparingly. Professional readable Chinese typography, no pseudo-writing, no random English headings. Text must be large enough for slide thumbnails, high contrast, not overlapping, no cropped content. Single coherent slide, balanced density, full canvas usage, clear hierarchy. Avoid texture behind text, excessive glow, blur, watermark, signatures, logos, fake citations, fake benchmarks, fake company names.

Quality gates to satisfy visually:

- single coherent slide, not a collage of unrelated panels
- use the full 16:9 canvas with balanced density; avoid large accidental empty regions

- contains enough readable explanatory text to be useful as a PPT slide: title, takeaway, section labels, and concise body copy
- must not look like a layout-only wireframe or unlabeled component scaffold
- clear focal hierarchy with generous margins and no overcrowding
- high contrast between foreground and background
- no overlapping text or visual elements
- no cropped important content near slide edges
- no unreadable microtext, mojibake, pseudo-letters, or random captions
- data-like visuals must be source-grounded or deliberately abstract
- when verified metrics are unavailable, use unlabeled abstract mini-charts or schematic indicators rather than fake numbers
- professional typography and spacing suitable for a 16:9 presentation

Visual richness guidance:
- do not reduce the slide to five plain cards; add source-safe visual substance inside and around the pipeline
- synthetic thumbnails are allowed when they are clearly generic: microscopy-like panels, figure crops, mask overlays, charts, asset swatches, vector nodes, and editable-canvas previews
- unlabeled charts may show abstract trends, bars, or scatter patterns for visual metaphor only; do not add axis labels, numeric values, legends with unsupported method names, or performance claims
- avoid domain-specific imagery such as biomedical cells, molecules, organs, maps, hardware, company products, or clinical scenes unless provided by the source context
- for generic AI/pipeline topics, use neutral paper-figure thumbnails, document crops, layout grids, chart placeholders, mask overlays, UI-free vector diagrams, and editable-canvas previews
- show process transformation visually: raw figure -> detected text/regions -> separated assets -> native shapes -> editable slide output
- use varied panel scale, subtle shadows, thin rules, and accent color blocks to create depth and a finished editorial look
- include enough small visual detail to feel premium, while keeping semantic modules cleanly separable for DrawAI
- if a subtitle is useful, derive it only from the primary request and avoid unsupported claims

Composition guidance:
- 这是一组模板图库横向测试，每张图都必须是完整 PPT 页面，不是海报或纯插画。
- 同一模板的 4 页需要有明显连续 deck 一致性：标题系统、色彩、模块风格、图标/线条语言一致。
- 只根据本页 page_brief 改变页面类型；不要改变总主题。
- 文字应跟随用户输入语言和 visible_text_blocks，不要生成随机英文栏目或伪文字。
- compose like a finished slide, not a sparse wireframe or UI mockup
- use a rich overview structure when appropriate: title plus subtitle, left input bookend, central pipeline, right output bookend, and compact bottom overview band
- for academic or technical topics, prefer a left-to-right pipeline, method/results overview, or evidence hierarchy
- use abstract, source-safe visual evidence when exact datasets are unavailable: synthetic figure thumbnails, module cards, flow arrows, masks, crop examples, schematic charts without numeric labels
- maintain Swiss/editorial discipline: aligned columns, consistent spacing, restrained color accents, and clear typographic scale
- keep every visible label purposeful; do not add decorative pseudo-text to fill space
- make the result feel publication/presentation ready at first glance while preserving factual restraint

DrawAI post-processing constraints:
- 文本区域保持高对比，方便 OCR 识别。
- 模块边界清晰，方便 SAM/DrawAI 后续可编辑重建。
- 避免将语义文字压在复杂纹理、强噪声或低对比渐变上。
- use crisp object boundaries and clean layer separation where possible
- keep text regions high contrast and OCR-friendly if text appears
- avoid textured noise directly behind text or chart labels
- avoid excessive glow, blur, transparency, and low-contrast gradients over semantic content
- prefer simple geometric regions for tables, charts, cards, arrows, and panels
- leave enough spacing for DrawAI to segment text, icons, charts, and decorative assets

Variant instruction:
Create the strongest single version; do not make a collage or compare alternatives inside the image.

Negative constraints:
none

Final response contract: reply only {"generated": true}.

Central architecture: seven rounded module cards connected by thick clean arrows showing a clear process from left to right, with a feedback loop arrow from 人工反馈 back toward 意图识别 / 检索增强. Use playful but clean icon metaphors: speech bubble for 用户问题, compass/brain for 意图识别, document stack + magnifier for 检索增强, wrench/API blocks for 工具调用, robot pen/spark for 答案生成, chain/link + source document for 引用回溯, human checkmark clipboard for 人工反馈. Visible text and body-copy policy:
- Render a normal PPT explanation page: include required visible content, then add concise source-grounded body copy from the primary request, claims, and visible_text_blocks. Text must be readable, useful, and large enough for a slide thumbnail. Preserve the user's language unless the user explicitly asks for another language.
- text_density: medium
- main_language: Chinese. Use Chinese for the main title, subtitle, section headers, bullets, callouts, captions, warnings, and takeaway text.
- Keep English only for model/product/API names, acronyms, code identifiers, benchmark names, and standard technical terms where Chinese translation would be unnatural.
- Do not render generic English section headings. Use Chinese headings such as 核心结论、来源质量、威胁模型、记忆分层、状态表示、技术栈、风险边界.
- If REQUIRED_VISIBLE_TEXT contains English generic descriptors, treat them as semantic hints and render concise Chinese equivalents unless they also appear in EXACT_TEXT_DO_NOT_TRANSLATE.
- A mixed Chinese/English technical slide is acceptable only when the Chinese text remains dominant and explanatory.
- Match the language of the primary request and supplied visible text. If the request is Chinese, render Chinese slide copy; preserve model names, APIs, metrics, and technical terms in English only where they are proper nouns or standard terms.
- Do not translate Chinese headings, bullets, or speaker-facing explanations into English unless the user explicitly requests English.
- Required visible text is a floor, not a ceiling: do not reduce the slide to labels and layout only.
- Minimum useful text: a clear title, subtitle or takeaway when supplied, readable section/module labels, and 3-6 concise explanatory bullets or callouts.
- For medium-density technical PPT pages, use normal slide copy density: enough text to explain the idea at a glance while preserving spacing.
- Body copy may paraphrase only the primary request, supplied claims, visible_text_blocks, and source-grounded context.
- Avoid tiny text, gibberish, pseudo-writing, watermark-like marks, signatures, random labels, and unreadable micro-captions.
- If exact long text rendering is risky, split it into shorter readable bullets or callouts; never leave the slide textless.

Quality gates to satisfy visually:
- 必须能看出这是连续 deck 的一页。
- 必须包含标题、核心结论/说明、结构化内容区。
- 不要编造公司名、真实客户案例、市场规模、年份、benchmark 或未给定数字。
- single coherent slide, not a collage of unrelated panels
- use the full 16:9 canvas with balanced density; avoid large accidental empty regions
- presentation polish should be comparable to a manually designed high-impact academic overview slide
- contains enough readable explanatory text to be useful as a PPT slide: title, takeaway, section labels, and concise body copy
- must not look like a layout-only wireframe or unlabeled component scaffold
- clear focal hierarchy with generous margins and no overcrowding
- high contrast between foreground and background
- no overlapping text or visual elements
- no cropped important content near slide edges
- no unreadable microtext, mojibake, pseudo-letters, or random captions
- data-like visuals must be source-grounded or deliberately abstract
- when verified metrics are unavailable, use unlabeled abstract mini-charts or schematic indicators rather than fake numbers
- professional typography and spacing suitable for a 16:9 presentation

Visual richness guidance:
- do not reduce the slide to five plain cards; add source-safe visual substance inside and around the pipeline
- synthetic thumbnails are allowed when they are clearly generic: microscopy-like panels, figure crops, mask overlays, charts, asset swatches, vector nodes, and editable-canvas previews
- unlabeled charts may show abstract trends, bars, or scatter patterns for visual metaphor only; do not add axis labels, numeric values, legends with unsupported method names, or performance claims
- avoid domain-specific imagery such as biomedical cells, molecules, organs, maps, hardware, company products, or clinical scenes unless provided by the source context
- for generic AI/pipeline topics, use neutral paper-figure thumbnails, document crops, layout grids, chart placeholders, mask overlays, UI-free vector diagrams, and editable-canvas previews
- show process transformation visually: raw figure -> detected text/regions -> separated assets -> native shapes -> editable slide output
- use varied panel scale, subtle shadows, thin rules, and accent color blocks to create depth and a finished editorial look
- include enough small visual detail to feel premium, while keeping semantic modules cleanly separable for DrawAI
- if a subtitle is useful, derive it only from the primary request and avoid unsupported claims

Composition guidance:
- 这是一组模板图库横向测试，每张图都必须是完整 PPT 页面，不是海报或纯插画。
- 同一模板的 4 页需要有明显连续 deck 一致性：标题系统、色彩、模块风格、图标/线条语言一致。
- 只根据本页 page_brief 改变页面类型；不要改变总主题。
- 文字应跟随用户输入语言和 visible_text_blocks，不要生成随机英文栏目或伪文字。
- compose like a finished slide, not a sparse wireframe or UI mockup
- use a rich overview structure when appropriate: title plus subtitle, left input bookend, central pipeline, right output bookend, and compact bottom overview band
- for academic or technical topics, prefer a left-to-right pipeline, method/results overview, or evidence hierarchy
- use abstract, source-safe visual evidence when exact datasets are unavailable: synthetic figure thumbnails, module cards, flow arrows, masks, crop examples, schematic charts without numeric labels
- maintain Swiss/editorial discipline: aligned columns, consistent spacing, restrained color accents, and clear typographic scale
- keep every visible label purposeful; do not add decorative pseudo-text to fill space
- make the result feel publication/presentation ready at first glance while preserving factual restraint

DrawAI post-processing constraints:
- 文本区域保持高对比，方便 OCR 识别。
- 模块边界清晰，方便 SAM/DrawAI 后续可编辑重建。
- 避免将语义文字压在复杂纹理、强噪声或低对比渐变上。
- use crisp object boundaries and clean layer separation where possible
- keep text regions high contrast and OCR-friendly if text appears
- avoid textured noise directly behind text or chart labels
- avoid excessive glow, blur, transparency, and low-contrast gradients over semantic content
- prefer simple geometric regions for tables, charts, cards, arrows, and panels
- leave enough spacing for DrawAI to segment text, icons, charts, and decorative assets

Variant instruction:
Create the strongest single version; do not make a collage or compare alternatives inside the image.

Negative constraints:
none

Final response contract: reply only {"generated": true}.

images.revised_prompt:
Create one 2048x1152 high-quality opaque PNG PPT slide bitmap, 16:9, in a polished original comic/manga classroom template style. Chinese-first baked text, OCR-readable, no pseudo-writing.

Slide 1/4, overview page. Theme: “AI Agent 工作流如何接入企业文档体系”. Audience: enterprise management, knowledge management, AI product/technical teams.

Visual system: original ip-safe comic/manga classroom explainer, black/white ink base with clean screentone textures, blue/red/yellow accents, crisp panel borders, speech-like callouts, classroom board motif, original teacher/student characters only, no known anime/manga IP. Finished PPT explanation page, not poster, not wireframe. Maintain generous margins, clear segmentation, high contrast text on clean backgrounds.

Layout: full-slide editorial overview. Top title band with manga classroom styling: large Chinese title “AI Agent 工作流如何接入企业文档体系”. Under it, prominent takeaway in a white speech/caption box: “不是把文档丢给模型，而是把知识源、权限、检索和评估接成可控闭环。” Add small page marker “第 1/4 页 · 接入总览”.

Main content: a coherent left-to-right pipeline across the center, like a classroom blackboard with manga panel divisions and arrows. Show five major modules with clear labels and short Chinese copy:
1. 文档接入 — “连接企业文档源，抽取文本与结构。” Use generic document stack/folder icons, no logos.
2. 知识治理 — “清洗、分层、标签与版本管理。” Use schematic index cards/nodes.
3. 权限边界 — “按角色与场景控制可见范围。” Use lock/shield and boundary line.
4. Agent 编排 — “检索增强 + 工具调用 + 任务流。” Use simple workflow nodes and robot/assistant icon, generic.
5. 持续评估 — “复核、反馈、拦截高风险回答。” Use checklist/loop arrow.

Include a bottom compact governance loop band with readable Chinese labels: “文档源 → 知识索引 → Agent 工作流 → 人工复核 → 评估反馈”. Add a small footnote in Chinese: “注：本页为测试主题示意，避免使用真实公司、客户案例或未提供数据。”

Character/dialogue element: place an original teacher character near the left or bottom pointing to the pipeline with a small speech bubble: “关键是闭环治理，不是一次性导入。” Place an original student character near the right asking: “权限和评估也在流程里？” Keep characters secondary and not covering text.

Visual richness: manga panel sequence, classroom board background, clean paper texture only outside text areas, thin ink rules, blue arrows for flow, red/yellow accent tags for risk/governance. Use small generic visual thumbnails: document crops, abstract index grid, permission boundary, workflow node graph, feedback loop. Do not add unsupported metrics, dates, citations, company names, product logos, real UI, benchmarks, market claims, or random English headings.

Quality: high contrast, readable Chinese typography, complete baked text, no mojibake, no microtext, no overlapping elements, no cropped important content, balanced density across full canvas, clear object boundaries for downstream DrawAI segmentation.

- 同一模板的 4 页需要有明显连续 deck 一致性：标题系统、色彩、模块风格、图标/线条语言一致。
- 只根据本页 page_brief 改变页面类型；不要改变总主题。
- 文字应跟随用户输入语言和 visible_text_blocks，不要生成随机英文栏目或伪文字。
- compose like a finished slide, not a sparse wireframe or UI mockup
- use a rich overview structure when appropriate: title plus subtitle, left input bookend, central pipeline, right output bookend, and compact bottom overview band
- for academic or technical topics, prefer a left-to-right pipeline, method/results overview, or evidence hierarchy
- use abstract, source-safe visual evidence when exact datasets are unavailable: synthetic figure thumbnails, module cards, flow arrows, masks, crop examples, schematic charts without numeric labels
- maintain Swiss/editorial discipline: aligned columns, consistent spacing, restrained color accents, and clear typographic scale
- keep every visible label purposeful; do not add decorative pseudo-text to fill space
- make the result feel publication/presentation ready at first glance while preserving factual restraint

DrawAI post-processing constraints:
- 文本区域保持高对比，方便 OCR 识别。
- 模块边界清晰，方便 SAM/DrawAI 后续可编辑重建。
- 避免将语义文字压在复杂纹理、强噪声或低对比渐变上。
- use crisp object boundaries and clean layer separation where possible
- keep text regions high contrast and OCR-friendly if text appears
- avoid textured noise directly behind text or chart labels
- avoid excessive glow, blur, transparency, and low-contrast gradients over semantic content
- prefer simple geometric regions for tables, charts, cards, arrows, and panels
- leave enough spacing for DrawAI to segment text, icons, charts, and decorative assets

Variant instruction:
Create the strongest single version; do not make a collage or compare alternatives inside the image.

Negative constraints:
none

Final response contract: reply only {"generated": true}.

2048x1152 high-quality opaque PNG, 16:9 premium PPT slide bitmap, baked Chinese text, comic_manga_classroom visual system. Create slide 3/4 of a continuous deck about “AI Agent 工作流如何接入企业文档体系”. Style: original IP-safe comic/manga classroom explainer, clean black/white ink base, blue/red/yellow accents, subtle screentone textures only in non-text areas, polished PPT architecture page, not poster, not collage. Use readable Chinese typography, high contrast, generous margins, crisp module boundaries for OCR/segmentation.

Slide title at top left: “Agent 工作流架构”. Small page marker at top right: “03 / 04”. Under title, prominent takeaway text in a clean caption band: “Agent 需要在意图识别、检索增强、工具调用和引用回溯之间保持状态。”

Main composition: classroom blackboard / manga panel hybrid architecture diagram. Left-to-right workflow with clearly connected modules and arrows, each in separate bordered manga-style panels/cards. Required labels must be large and legible: “用户问题” -> “意图识别” -> “检索增强” -> “工具调用” -> “答案生成” -> “引用回溯” -> “人工反馈”. Show feedback looping back toward 意图识别 / 检索增强 with a curved arrow labeled “反馈优化”. Include small state ribbon running above the modules labeled “共享状态：问题上下文 / 权限边界 / 检索证据 / 工具结果”.

Visual details inside modules, source-safe and generic: 用户问题 panel has a speech bubble from an original student character; 意图识别 has simple intent tags; 检索增强 has generic document stack and magnifier with “RAG”; 工具调用 has neutral tool icons and API-like blocks without company logos; 答案生成 has a draft answer sheet; 引用回溯 has source cards linked by lines; 人工反馈 has an original teacher character checking a response. Use original classroom characters only, no known anime/manga IP.

Bottom overview band with 4 concise Chinese callouts, readable, no unsupported numbers: “文档接入：汇入企业知识库”, “知识治理：清洗、分级、版本管理”, “权限边界：按角色控制可见范围”, “持续评估：记录反馈并改进流程”. Add a small note in bottom-right: “数值仅为测试样例数据，不代表真实业务结果。” Do not invent company names, dates, rankings, benchmarks, citations, logos, real UI, or unsupported metrics.

Design must feel like a finished slide in a comic classroom deck: manga panel borders, halftone accents, neat arrows, editorial alignment, balanced density, no overlapping text, no cropped elements, no pseudo-writing, no unreadable microtext, no random English headings. Chinese remains dominant; English only for RAG/API where standard. Use full canvas with clear hierarchy and presentation polish.
